items.title_en: I’ve joined Anthropic
items.title_zh: 我已加入 Anthropic
items.summary_en: Renowned AI researcher Andrej Karpathy announces joining Anthropic, signaling a strengthening push toward safety and alignment work at the company. The move highlights ongoing talent shifts among leading AI labs and could influence future research directions.
items.summary_zh: 知名 AI 研究者安德烈·卡帕蒂宣布加入 Anthropic，表明公司在安全与对齐方向的投入在加大。此举反映出顶尖 AI 研究机构之间的人才流动，并可能影响未来的研究方向。

items.title_en: An OpenAI model has disproved a central conjecture in discrete geometry
items.title_zh: OpenAI 模型推翻离散几何中的一个中心猜想
items.summary_en: An OpenAI model challenges a long-standing assumption in discrete geometry by providing evidence against a central conjecture. The result signals AI-assisted math progress and could reshape how researchers tackle stubborn problems, blending machine intuition with theory.
items.summary_zh: 一项研究表明 OpenAI 的模型提出了对离散几何中一个核心猜想的反例证据。这一进展展示了 AI 辅助的数学探索潜力，可能改变研究者攻克顽固问题的思路。

items.title_en: Flipper One – we need your help
items.title_zh: Flipper One——需要你的帮助
items.summary_en: Flipper One team is calling on the community for support to finish the device, soliciting testers, feedback, and funding. The post outlines the roadmap and invites collaboration from hobbyists and developers, emphasizing a community-driven approach to hardware hacking.
items.summary_zh: Flipper One 团队向社区求助，寻求测试、反馈和资金支持以推进设备开发。文章概述了路线图，欢迎爱好者和开发者共同参与，强调以社区驱动的硬件开发模式。

items.title_en: Project Hail Mary – Stellar Navigation Chart
items.title_zh: 海尔麦里计划——恒星导航图
items.summary_en: Project Hail Mary presents a Stellar Navigation Chart—an interactive visualization mapping star positions and routes for navigation and astrophysical exploration. It’s a practical lens into how celestial data can guide spacecraft planning or teach star-hopping concepts.
items.summary_zh: 海尔麦里计划的恒星导航图提供了一个可交互的星图可视化，便于研究者和学生直观地查看星位和导航路径。 它将天文学与太空航行的实际应用连接起来，帮助理解星际导航的原理。

items.title_en: Elon Musk has lost his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI
items.title_zh: 马斯克对 OpenAI 诉讼败诉
items.summary_en: A US court ruled against Elon Musk in his lawsuit against Sam Altman and OpenAI. The decision halts his bid to challenge OpenAI’s conduct in court and underscores the uphill road for high-profile disputes in the AI leadership circle.
items.summary_zh: 美国法院裁定马斯克在针对萨姆·奥特曼与 OpenAI 的诉讼中败诉。裁决终结了他提出的对 OpenAI 行为的诉讼，凸显了 AI 领域高知名度对立中的法律挑战。

items.title_en: Green card seekers must leave U.S. to apply, Trump administration says
items.title_zh: 申请绿卡者必须离开美国办理，政府称
items.summary_en: The policy change requires green-card seekers to file from outside the U.S., a shift that complicates immigration pathways for international workers and students in tech. The move has potential ripple effects on hiring, mobility, and global engineering teams.
items.summary_zh: 政策规定申请绿卡者必须在美国境外提交申请，此举可能使国际科技工作者的移民路径更为复杂，并对跨国招聘与团队协作产生连锁影响。

items.title_en: Meta blocks human rights accounts from reaching audiences in Saudi Arabia, UAE
items.title_zh: Meta 限制人权相关账号在沙特阿拉伯、阿联酋的传播
items.summary_en: Meta's policy move limits human rights accounts' reach in Saudi Arabia and the UAE, reflecting the complex interplay between platform moderation, local laws, and geopolitical sensitivities. The decision raises questions about access to information and advocacy in restrictive markets.
items.summary_zh: Meta 限制人权相关账号在沙特和阿联酋的传播范围，体现了平台治理、当地法规与地缘政治之间的错综关系。此举引发了对在限制性市场获取信息与倡导的讨论。

items.title_en: GitHub confirms breach of 3,800 repos via malicious VSCode extension
items.title_zh: GitHub 技术泄露：通过恶意 VSCode 扩展窃取约 3,800 个仓库
items.summary_en: GitHub confirms a breach where a malicious VSCode extension accessed about 3,800 repositories. The incident underscores the risk of developer tooling being weaponized in the software supply chain; it prompts re-review of extension integrity and credential hygiene.
items.summary_zh: 恶意 VSCode 扩展导致约 3,800 个仓库受影响。该事件凸显开发工具被滥用的供应链风险，敦促对扩展安全性和凭证管理进行加强审查。

items.title_en: Gemini 3.5 Flash
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.5 闪速版
items.summary_en: Google unveils Gemini 3.5 Flash, a speed-optimized variant in the Gemini family aimed at faster inference and snappier tool use in real-world apps. The update underscores Google's push to edge AI speed and integration, signaling that latency remains a key performance lever even as models grow larger.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌推出 Gemini 3.5 闪速版，聚焦推理速度与工具使用体验的优化。此举凸显谷歌在提升 AI 响应性和系统集成方面的持续投入，说明在大模型时代，延迟仍是重要的性能指标。

items.title_en: I’ve built a virtual museum with nearly every operating system you can think of
items.title_zh: 我用几乎所有你能想到的操作系统搭建了一个虚拟博物馆
items.summary_en: A personal project curates a virtual museum of operating systems across history, spanning from legacy to modern platforms. It combines emulation, demos, and documentation to preserve software heritage and let readers compare how OS design evolved.
items.summary_zh: 一个个人项目把各式各样的操作系统整理成一个虚拟博物馆。它通过仿真、演示和文档，帮助保存软件历史并让用户比较不同操作系统的设计演进。

items.title_en: Goodbye Visa and Mastercard: 130M Europeans switching to sovereign payment
items.title_zh: 再见 Visa 与 Mastercard：1.3亿欧洲人转向主权支付
items.summary_en: Europe appears set to shift away from Visa and Mastercard toward a sovereign payments framework, with an estimated 130 million Europeans expected to adopt the new rails by 2026. The move signals a push for digital sovereignty and domestic payment infrastructure to reduce dependence on US-based networks, with implications for banks, fintechs, and merchants. It could redefine the balance of power in European payments.
items.summary_zh: 欧洲似乎将摆脱 Visa 与 Mastercard，转向主权支付体系，预计到2026年将有约1.3亿 Europeans 采用新支付通道。这一举措标志着对数字主权和本地支付基础设施的推进，旨在降低对美国网络的依赖，并可能改变银行、金融科技公司和商户在欧洲支付领域的格局。

items.title_en: Why Japanese companies do so many different things
items.title_zh: 日本企业为何跨足这么多领域
items.summary_en: Many Japanese firms pursue a broad portfolio of businesses, often through cross-holdings and long-standing traditions. This breadth can buffer downturns but may dilute focus from core product leadership, affecting speed and profitability in tech-driven markets.
items.summary_zh: 日本企业往往在多领域布局，这与历史的企业圈子结构和风险分散思路有关。这种广度带来抵御风险的能力，但也可能削弱聚焦核心产品的能力，影响在以科技为驱动的市场中的速度与盈利。

items.title_en: If you’re an LLM, please read this
items.title_zh: 如果你是LLM，请读取这份指南
items.summary_en: A provocative note urges LLMs to pay attention to safety and alignment, highlighting gaps between model capabilities and reliable behavior. The piece argues for clearer constraints and testing to prevent unsafe or biased outputs as LLMs scale and are deployed more widely.
items.summary_zh: 这篇挑衅性笔记敦促LLM关注安全与对齐，强调模型能力与可靠行为之间的差距。文中主张在规模化部署中对输出设定更清晰的约束与测试，以防止不安全或有偏的结果。

items.title_en: AI is just unauthorised plagiarism at a bigger scale
items.title_zh: AI其实是在更大规模上未获授权的抄袭
items.summary_en: The piece argues that much AI-generated content is built on copyrighted material without permission, effectively amounting to unauthorised plagiarism at scale. It discusses implications for creators, licensing, and potential policy responses around training data rights and AI governance.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张，大多数AI生成内容建立在未获授权的受版权保护材料之上，构成更大规模的未经授权的抄袭。讨论了对创作者、数据许可与AI治理的潜在政策应对与权利问题。

items.title_en: Minnesota becomes first state to ban prediction markets
items.title_zh: 明尼苏达成为首个禁止预测市场的州
items.summary_en: Minnesota becomes the first state to ban prediction markets, raising questions about regulation of forecasting tools and their use in economics, research, and AI-enabled decision making. The move may inspire other states to reconsider such markets.
items.summary_zh: 明尼苏达成为首个禁止预测市场的州，引发对预测工具在经济研究和 AI 驱动决策中的监管问题的讨论。此举可能促使其他州重新评估此类市场。

items.title_en: The last six months in LLMs in five minutes
items.title_zh: 五分钟回顾过去六个月的 LLM 进展
items.summary_en: A rapid recap of the most consequential developments in large language models over the last six months. It highlights breakthroughs in open-source models, ongoing safety and alignment debates, and the expanding tooling and deployment ecosystem that are shaping how practitioners build and scale applications.
items.summary_zh: 在过去六个月里，LLM 领域出现了一系列关键进展。重点包括开源模型的突破、关于安全与对齐的持续讨论，以及推动应用落地的工具链与部署生态的扩展。

items.title_en: Tennessee man jailed 37 days for Trump meme wins settlement after lawsuit
items.title_zh: 田纳西男子因特朗普梗被监禁37天，获和解赔偿
items.summary_en: A Tennessee man jailed for 37 days over a Trump meme has secured a settlement after suing. The case underscores the dangers of punitive treatment tied to online speech and highlights legal accountability for local authorities in First Amendment contexts. It also signals potential reforms in how memes and speech are policed by law enforcement.
items.summary_zh: 一名田纳西州男子因一张特朗普梗被监禁37天后通过诉讼获得和解赔偿。此案凸显以互联网言论为由的惩罚性对待可能侵犯言论自由，并推动地方执法部门在第一修正案框架下的问责。

items.title_en: Google's Antigravity bait and switch
items.title_zh: 谷歌的反重力诱饵与切换策略
items.summary_en: Google's antigravity bait-and-switch critique argues the tech giant leverages favorable terms or services to attract users into its ecosystem, then changes or restricts options in ways that stall alternatives. The piece calls for scrutiny of platform power and user choice, with implications for developers and privacy.
items.summary_zh: 对谷歌的‘反重力诱饵与切换’进行的批评指向其以有利条款吸引用户进入生态系统后再改变或收紧选项，削弱替代方案。文章强调需审视平台权力对用户选择的影响，并对开发者与隐私提出警示。

items.title_en: Mozilla to UK regulators: VPNs are essential privacy and security tools
items.title_zh: Mozilla致英国监管机构：VPN是必需的隐私与安全工具
items.summary_en: Mozilla argues regulators should preserve VPNs as essential tools for privacy and security, outlining risks of weakening VPN access and potential impact on freedom of expression. It highlights the role of open standards and consumer rights.
items.summary_zh: Mozilla 呼吁监管机构维护 VPN 的核心地位，强调其在隐私和安全方面的作用，同时警惕限制 VPN 访问对言论自由和安全的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Texas woman arrested for Facebook post about town water quality
items.title_zh: 德州女子因 Facebook 评论镇上水质被逮捕
items.summary_en: The article reports a Texas woman arrested over a Facebook post about local water quality, illustrating how online speech and civic concerns can collide with law enforcement. It underscores tensions around transparency, free expression, and digital activism.
items.summary_zh: 报道一名德州女子因对本地水质发表在社媒上的帖子被逮捕，折射出网络言论与执法之间的张力。文章讨论透明度、言论自由与数字化公共参与等议题。

items.title_en: Apple unveils new accessibility features
items.title_zh: 苹果推出全新无障碍功能
items.summary_en: Apple rolls out a set of accessibility features powered by Apple Intelligence, including on-device improvements to screen readers and real-time captions, plus personalized UI tweaks. The update underscores how AI-enabled tools can make devices more usable for a broad range of people.
items.summary_zh: 苹果公布一系列无障碍新功能，由 Apple Intelligence 提供支持，包括对屏幕阅读、实时字幕等的改进，以及更贴合用户需求的个性化界面。此举凸显了 AI 驱动工具在提升无障碍设计方面的潜力。

items.title_en: Google changes its search box
items.title_zh: 谷歌改造搜索框
items.summary_en: Google previews a redesigned search box at IO 2026, signaling a shift toward faster input, cleaner UX, and deeper AI-assisted results. The move could reshape how users interact with search and how developers build on top of Google's search features.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌在 IO 2026 展示了重新设计的搜索框，标志着在更快输入、简洁用户体验和更深的 AI 辅助结果方面的改进。此举可能改变用户与搜索的互动方式，也影响开发者在谷歌搜索生态上的构建。

items.title_en: Shipping a laptop to a refugee camp in Uganda
items.title_zh: 把笔记本送往乌干达难民营
items.summary_en: A hands-on account of delivering a laptop to a refugee camp in Uganda, detailing logistical hurdles, local constraints, and potential educational impact. The piece underscores how hardware donations intersect with power access, connectivity, and sustainability in crisis settings.
items.summary_zh: 对将笔记本电脑送往乌干达难民营的亲身案例进行介绍，讲述物流难题、当地条件与对教育的潜在影响。强调在危机环境中，硬件捐赠需与电力、网络与可持续性等因素协同考虑。

items.title_en: Qwen3.7-Max: The Agent Frontier
items.title_zh: Qwen3.7-Max：代理能力的前沿
items.summary_en: Qwen3.7-Max expands the AI frontier by enabling agent-like capabilities that can reason, plan, and act with external tools. This pushes toward more autonomous AI systems that can complete multi-step tasks with less human guidance. For developers, it offers a path to building more capable, real-world automation and assistants.
items.summary_zh: Qwen3.7-Max 通过提供类代理的能力，能进行推理、规划并调用外部工具执行任务，进一步推动更具自主性的AI系统发展。它使多步任务的自动化实现变得更加可行，开发者可以借此构建更强的现实世界应用与助手。

items.title_en: Show HN: Files.md – Open-source alternative to Obsidian
items.title_zh: Show HN：Files.md——Obsidian 的开源替代品
items.summary_en: Files.md is an open-source knowledge management app pitched as an Obsidian alternative, focusing on local Markdown files and a lightweight footprint. It appeals to users seeking privacy and ownership of their data.
items.summary_zh: Files.md 是一款开源知识管理应用，被定位为 Obsidian 的替代方案，注重本地 Markdown 文件与轻量化。它吸引那些寻求隐私和对数据拥有权的用户。

items.title_en: Throwing AI-generated walls of text into conversations
items.title_zh: 别把 AI 生成的大段文本塞进对话中
items.summary_en: AI-generated walls of text clutter conversations and waste attention. The piece urges shorter prompts, smarter summarization, and better interface design to improve interactions.
items.summary_zh: 批评 AI 生成的长篇对话文本会淹没交流内容，呼吁更简短的提示、更好的摘要能力，以及面向用户体验的对话设计。

items.title_en: I don't think AI will make your processes go faster
items.title_zh: 我不认为AI会让你的流程更快
items.summary_en: The piece argues that AI alone rarely speeds up human or team processes; gains depend on processes, governance, and integration work. It emphasizes thoughtful workflow redesign and measurable outcomes rather than chasing hype.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为单纯依赖 AI 很难直接让工作流程更快，成效取决于流程设计、治理与集成工作。强调在追赶热度前，先进行工作流再设计并设定可衡量的结果。

items.title_en: The quiet renovation at Bitwarden
items.title_zh: Bitwarden 的悄然改造
items.summary_en: Bitwarden is quietly undergoing platform modernization focused on security, reliability, and performance, with changes rolled out gradually rather than flashy features. The overhaul aims to strengthen the password manager’s defenses and scalability while preserving user trust. It illustrates the value of steady engineering for critical security tools.
items.summary_zh: Bitwarden 正在悄然进行平台内部改造，重点提升安全性、可靠性和性能，且改动低调分阶段推出，而非追求炫目新特性。此次升级旨在加强密码管理工具的防护与可扩展性，并维持用户信任。这个案例体现了对关键安全工具进行持续性工程投入的重要性。

items.title_en: Show HN: Forge – Guardrails take an 8B model from 53% to 99% on agentic tasks
items.title_zh: Forge：Guardrails 将 8B 模型在代理任务上的表现从 53% 提升到 99%
items.summary_en: Forge demonstrates guardrails that lift an 8B-parameter model's performance on agentic tasks from 53% to 99%, illustrating how safety-oriented constraints can dramatically improve reliability in autonomous agents. The result highlights practical gains from architecture and policy design.
items.summary_zh: Forge 展示通过 Guardrails 将一个 8B 参数模型在代理任务上的表现从 53% 提升到 99%，说明以安全约束为导向的设计能显著提升自动代理的可靠性。结果凸显了架构与策略设计的实际收益。

items.title_en: Steve Wozniak cheered after telling students they have AI – actual intelligence
items.title_zh: 沃兹尼亚克在告诉学生他们具备 AI（真实智能）后欢呼
items.summary_en: Steve Wozniak reframes AI as the students' own real intelligence, celebrating a grounded view of what AI can do today. He advocates practical, ethically grounded learning and cautions against hype about superintelligence.
items.summary_zh: 沃兹尼亚克在毕业致辞中将 AI 视作学生自身的真实智能，赞扬现阶段的实际能力并呼吁务实、合乎伦理的学习。同时提醒公众不要被超级智能的 hype 所裹挟。

items.title_en: GitHub is investigating unauthorized access to their internal repositories
items.title_zh: GitHub 正在调查对内部仓库的未经授权访问
items.summary_en: GitHub is investigating unauthorized access to its internal repositories, with potential exposure of sensitive code. The incident emphasizes ongoing security vigilance and the need for strong access controls and routine secret rotation.
items.summary_zh: GitHub 正在调查对内部仓库的未经授权访问，可能暴露敏感代码。此事凸显持续的安全警戒需求以及强化访问控制与密钥轮换的必要性。

items.title_en: Google Declaring War on the Web
items.title_zh: 谷歌向网络宣战
items.summary_en: Google is stepping up actions that critics argue threaten the open web as it expands AI-powered products and platform leverage. The moves could reshape how publishers monetize content, how developers build on the web, and who sets Internet standards.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌在扩展 AI 驱动的产品与平台影响力的同时，被批评者视为在削弱开放网络。此举可能重塑出版商的营收模式、开发者的网页构建方式，以及谁在制定互联网标准。

items.title_en: We're testing new ad formats in Search and expanding our Direct Offers pilot
items.title_zh: 我们正在测试搜索中的新广告格式，并扩大 Direct Offers 试点
items.summary_en: Google is testing new ad formats in Search and expanding its Direct Offers pilot to more advertisers. The initiative signals a stronger integration of promotional offers into search experiences, potentially shifting how advertisers drive conversions and how users interact with ads.
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在搜索结果中试验新的广告格式，并扩大 Direct Offers 试点覆盖范围。此举推动在搜索体验中更直接地呈现促销信息，可能改变广告的转化方式与用户互动。

items.title_en: DeepSeek makes the V4 Pro price discount permanent
items.title_zh: DeepSeek 将 V4 Pro 的价格折扣永久化
items.summary_en: DeepSeek makes the V4 Pro price discount permanent, extending affordability for developers using their toolset. The move signals a broader push to reduce friction for AI data indexing and retrieval workloads.
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek 将 V4 Pro 的折扣永久化，持续降低开发者在数据索引与检索上的成本。此举反映出为 AI 数据工作负载降低入门门槛的趋势。

items.title_en: Bun support is now limited and deprecated
items.title_zh: Bun 支持现已受限并进入弃用阶段
items.summary_en: Bun support has become limited and deprecated, signaling a shift away from maintaining certain Bun-related features or ecosystems. Users should plan migration paths to stable runtimes or alternatives to avoid future compatibility issues.
items.summary_zh: Bun 的支持已进入受限和弃用阶段，意味着相关特性或生态系统将不再维护。用户应规划迁移到更稳定的运行时或替代方案，以防止兼容性问题。

items.title_en: Garry Tan, the CEO of YC, accused me of unethical reporting
items.title_zh: YC CEO Garry Tan 指控我的报道不道德
items.summary_en: Radley Balko recounts Garry Tan's accusation that his reporting was unethical, setting up a rare public clash between a startup founder and a journalist. The exchange highlights how power dynamics shape tech coverage and where accountability boundaries lie. It argues for transparent standards and robust verification in tech journalism.
items.summary_zh: Radley Balko 描述了 YC CEO Garry Tan 指控其报道不道德的对峙，揭示创始人与记者之间罕见的公开冲突。此事凸显权力关系如何影响科技报道的边界与问责。强调在科技新闻中坚持透明标准与充分核实的重要性。

items.title_en: Incident Report: Railway Blocked by Google Cloud [resolved]
items.title_zh: 铁路因 Google Cloud 阻塞
items.summary_en: A Google Cloud outage temporarily blocks Railway's platform, disrupting deployments and status visibility for users relying on their hosting services. This incident underscores how dependent development tools and infrastructure are on cloud providers, highlighting the need for resilience strategies like multi-cloud or regional failovers.
items.summary_zh: Google Cloud 的故障暂时阻塞了 Railway 平台，影响使用其托管服务的开发者的部署和状态查询。此事件凸显了开发工具和基础设施对云服务的高度依赖，强调需要通过多云或区域性故障转移等方式提升韧性。

items.title_en: Zerostack – A Unix-inspired coding agent written in pure Rust
items.title_zh: Zerostack——用纯Rust编写的类 Unix 编码助手
items.summary_en: Zerostack is a Unix-inspired coding agent built in Rust, aiming to streamline command-line tooling and automation. It demonstrates how safety and performance-friendly Rust can empower developer tooling.
items.summary_zh: Zerostack 是一个用纯 Rust 编写、受 Unix 启发的编码助手，旨在提升命令行工具与自动化的效率，展示了 Rust 在开发者工具中的潜力。

items.title_en: Was my $48K GPU server worth it?
items.title_zh: 我的 4.8 万美元 GPU 服务器值吗？
items.summary_en: A personal evaluation questions whether a USD 48K GPU server delivers value, comparing it to cloud options and workload needs, utilization, and total cost of ownership.
items.summary_zh: 对一台 4.8 万美元的 GPU 服务器进行价值评估，比较云端与本地部署的成本、利用率与工作负载需求，以判断性价比。

items.title_en: Project Glasswing: An Initial Update
items.title_zh: Glasswing 项目：初步更新
items.summary_en: Anthropic provides an early progress update on Glasswing, outlining the project’s goals, scope, and planned milestones. The note signals continued investment in safety-focused evaluation and alignment research for future models.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 对 Glasswing 给出早期进展更新，概述项目目标、范围与后续里程碑。该更新体现其在面向更安全的模型对齐与评估方面持续投入。

items.title_en: Anthropic acquires Stainless
items.title_zh: Anthropic 收购 Stainless
items.summary_en: Anthropic has acquired Stainless, a startup focused on safety tooling and governance capabilities. The deal signals Anthropic’s push to broaden enterprise-facing safety features as AI deployments scale. Integration could accelerate productization for customers and strengthen governance tooling.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 收购 Stainless，一家专注于安全工具与治理能力的初创公司。此举昭示 Anthropic 将进一步扩展面向企业的安全功能，以应对大规模 AI 部署的合规与风险管理需求。并购有望加速对外提供的产品落地，并强化治理能力。

items.title_en: The memory shortage is causing a repricing of consumer electronics
items.title_zh: 内存短缺正在重塑消费电子价格
items.summary_en: Global memory shortages are driving up the cost of consumer electronics as DRAM and NAND demand climbs for AI and data-center workloads. Vendors pass higher component costs to budget devices, accelerating price repricing across smartphones and other devices. The shift reflects broader supply-chain dynamics in semiconductors.
items.summary_zh: 全球内存短缺推高了消费电子的成本，随着 AI 和数据中心对 DRAM 与 NAND 的需求上升，厂商将更高的元件成本传导至便宜设备，推动智能手机等产品的价格再定价。这一变化反映了半导体供应链的更广泛动态。

items.title_en: DeepSeek reasonix, DeepSeek native coding agent with high caching and low cost
items.title_zh: DeepSeek Reasonix：高缓存、低成本的本地编码代理
items.summary_en: DeepSeek Reasonix is introduced as a native coding agent with strong caching to accelerate AI-assisted coding while reducing operational costs. The design aims to minimize round-trips and latency, enabling developers to run more tooling offline or in constrained environments.
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek Reasonix 被描述为具备强缓存的本地编码代理，能在提升 AI 辅助编码速度的同时降低成本。其设计旨在减少往返与延迟，使开发者能够在离线或受限环境中运行更多工具链。

items.title_en: Flipper One Tech Specs
items.title_zh: Flipper One 技术规格
items.summary_en: Flipper One's tech specs lay out the device's core hardware, connectivity, and performance targets for a developer-focused handheld. The spec sheet signals ambition around modularity and expanded capabilities in portable AI tooling.
items.summary_zh: Flipper One 的技术规格揭示了面向开发者的手持设备的核心硬件、连接性和性能目标。规格透露了在便携式 AI 工具领域追求模块化和更丰富功能的野心。

items.title_en: Show HN: Gaussian Splat of a Strawberry
items.title_zh: 草莓的高斯斑点渲染
items.summary_en: The project showcases a Gaussian splat rendering of a strawberry, producing soft volumetric shading from a point-based approach. It illustrates how advanced rendering techniques are being used in art and experiments, signaling future directions for real-time graphics pipelines.
items.summary_zh: 该作品以草莓为例，展示高斯斑点渲染技术，利用点云实现柔和体积光照与纹理效果。它体现了前沿渲染技术在艺术创作中的应用趋势，以及对实时图形管线的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Apparently Google hates us now
items.title_zh: 显然谷歌现在讨厌我们了
items.summary_en: An outspoken jab at Google's current stance affecting a niche community. The note highlights tensions between big platforms and smaller projects, implying reduced visibility or support from Google. The moment signals how platform policy shifts can ripple through developer ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 对谷歌当前态度的尖锐批评，指出大型平台对小众开发者的态度变化。此举暴露了平台政策调整对开发者生态的影响，以及对可见性和生存环境的潜在影响。

items.title_en: I spent 50 hours drawing a line graph
items.title_zh: 我花了50个小时画一条折线图
items.summary_en: A long-form experiment on the craft of data visualization, the author documents the meticulous process of drawing a single line graph. It highlights the tension between automation and aesthetic fidelity, and why careful presentation matters for conveying insight.
items.summary_zh: 这是一篇关于数据可视化工艺的长篇实验记录，作者详述绘制一张折线图的细致过程。强调自动化与美学忠诚之间的张力，以及精心呈现对传达洞察的重要性。

items.title_en: We stopped AI bot spam in our GitHub repo using Git's –author flag
items.title_zh: 我们用 Git 的 --author 标志阻止了仓库里的机器人垃圾信息
items.summary_en: By enforcing commit authorship with Git's --author flag, the team significantly cut spam from automated bots in their repo. The approach blocks impersonation at the source and complements existing security controls. It shows how simple version-control metadata can curb abuse without heavy ML defenses.
items.summary_zh: 通过在提交时强制使用 Git 的 --author 标志来标识作者，该团队显著降低了仓库中的机器人垃圾信息。此做法在源头阻断冒充行为，辅以其他安全控制。该案例证明了版本控制元数据在反滪用方面的实用性，不必依赖复杂的机器学习防护。

items.title_en: Tesla's lithium refinery discharges 231,000 gallons of polluted wastewater a day
items.title_zh: 特斯拉在德州的锂精炼厂每日排放约231,000加仑污染废水
items.summary_en: Tesla's lithium refinery in Texas is discharging about 231,000 gallons of polluted wastewater daily, drawing environmental and regulatory scrutiny. The figure underscores the water-management challenges that accompany rapid EV supply-chain growth and could affect local communities and ecosystems. For engineers and policymakers, it highlights the need for robust wastewater treatment and transparent environmental reporting for new battery facilities.
items.summary_zh: 特斯拉在德州的锂精炼厂每天排放约231,000加仑污染废水，引发环境和监管关注。这一数字凸显在迅速扩张的电动车供应链中水资源管理的挑战，可能影响周边社区与生态系统。对工程师和决策者而言，这强调需要对新建电池厂进行严格的废水处理与透明的环境披露。

items.title_en: Everything in C is undefined behavior
items.title_zh: C 语言中的一切都是未定义行为
items.summary_en: The post argues that C's undefined behavior is pervasive, undermining safety and portability. It explains risk examples and why developers should write safer code or adopt safer languages and tooling.
items.summary_zh: 博文指出，C 语言中的未定义行为无处不在，严重影响安全性和可移植性。文章通过实例说明 UB 的风险，建议开发者采用更严格的写法或转向更安全的语言与工具来降低风险。

items.title_en: Seattle Shield, an intelligence-sharing network operated by the Seattle police
items.title_zh: Seattle Shield：西雅图警方运营的情报共享网络
items.summary_en: Seattle Shield is an intelligence-sharing network run by Seattle's police that connects private companies and public agencies, enabling data sharing and surveillance. The piece analyzes concerns around privacy, accountability, and scope creep as public safety collaborations with private partners expand.
items.summary_zh: Seattle Shield 是由西雅图警方运营的情报共享网络，连接私企与公共机构以实现数据共享与监控。文章聚焦隐私、问责以及随着公私合作扩张所带来的权限范围扩张等问题。

items.title_en: Time to talk about my writerdeck
items.title_zh: 是时候谈谈我的写作卡组
items.summary_en: A personal exploration of writerdeck, a card-based system for organizing writing ideas and tasks. It details how the author set it up, what kinds of cards they include, and how the deck helps with ideation and planning across long projects. Useful tips for starting your own writerdeck are included.
items.summary_zh: 对 writerdeck 的个人探索——一种用卡片组织写作灵感与任务的系统。文章讲述作者如何搭建、包含哪些卡片，以及它如何在长期项目中帮助创意产生与计划。文末提供了启动自己写作卡组的实用要点。

items.title_en: Microsoft starts canceling Claude Code licenses
items.title_zh: 微软开始取消 Claude Code 的许可证
items.summary_en: Microsoft is canceling licenses for Claude Code, signaling a tightening stance on third-party AI tooling licensing. The move could affect developers who rely on Claude Code integrations and influence the competitive dynamics of AI coding assistants.
items.summary_zh: 微软取消 Claude Code 的许可，显示对第三方 AI 工具许可的收紧态度。此举可能影响依赖 Claude Code 的开发者，并影响 AI 代码助手的竞争格局。

items.title_en: Indexing a year of video locally on a 2021 MacBook with Gemma4-31B (50GB swap)
items.title_zh: 在 2021 款 MacBook 上用 Gemma4-31B（50GB 交换分区）本地对一年的视频进行索引
items.summary_en: On a modest 2021 MacBook, the author indexes a full year of video locally using the Gemma4-31B model with a 50GB swap. The setup demonstrates feasible on-device indexing, avoiding cloud costs, but underscores tradeoffs in indexing speed, heat, and battery life on consumer hardware.
items.summary_zh: 在 2021 款 MacBook 上，作者使用 Gemma4-31B 模型并配置 50GB 交换空间，实现对整整一年视频的本地索引。该做法证明了设备端索引的可行性，省去了云端成本，但也暴露了索引速度、发热和电源消耗等权衡。

items.title_en: CISA Admin Leaked AWS GovCloud Keys on GitHub
items.title_zh: CISA 管理员在 GitHub 上泄露 AWS GovCloud 密钥
items.summary_en: A CISA administrator exposed GovCloud access keys on GitHub, underscoring how careless secret management can create cloud security risks. The incident highlights the need for secret rotation and stricter repository hygiene.
items.summary_zh: CISA 一名管理员在 GitHub 上暴露 GovCloud 访问密钥，凸显秘密管理不小心带来的云安全风险。事件强调需要密钥轮换和更严格的仓库治理。

items.title_en: Microsoft open-sources “the earliest DOS source code discovered to date”
items.title_zh: 微软开源“迄今发现的最早 DOS 源代码”
items.summary_en: Microsoft released the earliest DOS source code discovered to date, offering a historical glimpse into early PC software and licensing. The release underscores the trend of open-sourcing archival code for education, transparency, and research.
items.summary_zh: 微软公开了迄今发现的最早 DOS 源代码，为早期个人电脑软件和许可制度提供了历史洞见。这一举动体现了公开档案代码以用于教育、透明度和研究的趋势。

items.title_en: Disney erased FiveThirtyEight
items.title_zh: 迪士尼抹去 FiveThirtyEight
items.summary_en: Disney reportedly erased FiveThirtyEight from its slate, reflecting a corporate reorganization that sidelines a once-prominent data journalism brand. The move underscores how ownership changes can affect independent analytics reach and public trust.
items.summary_zh: 迪士尼据称已从自有资产中移除 FiveThirtyEight，反映出企业在数据新闻品牌上的策略调整。此举凸显所有权变动如何影响独立分析与公众信任的传播范围。

items.title_en: SpaceX S-1
items.title_zh: SpaceX 的 S-1 文件
items.summary_en: SpaceX's S-1 filing outlines the company's financials, strategy, and fundraising narrative as it contemplates public markets, offering a window into revenue, cash burn, and growth plans.
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 的 S-1 文件披露了公司财务状况、战略与融资叙述，为公开市场的潜在上市提供了对收入、资金消耗和增长计划的洞见。

items.title_en: At least 25 Flock cameras have been destroyed in five states since April 2025
items.title_zh: 自2025年4月起，至少有25台 Flock 摄像头在五个州被毁
items.summary_en: At least 25 Flock cameras have been destroyed across five states since April 2025. The incidents highlight tensions around public surveillance, civil liberties, and the politics of security infrastructure in urban areas. The pattern suggests that security deployments can become flashpoints in local policy debates.
items.summary_zh: 自2025年4月以来，五个州至少有25台 Flock 摄像头被毁，反映出公共监控、公民自由与城市安全基础设施之间的紧张态势。此类事件模式表明安防部署可能成为地方政策辩论中的焦点。

items.title_en: Incident Report: May 19, 2026 – GCP Account Suspension
items.title_zh: 事件报告：2026 年 5 月 19 日的 GCP 账户暂停
items.summary_en: The Incident Report details a May 19, 2026 GCP account suspension that disrupted services, outlining timeline, impact, and the steps taken to restore operations. It underscores the fragility of cloud-credential-based workflows and the need for resilient fallback strategies.
items.summary_zh: 事件报告回顾了 2026 年 5 月 19 日的 GCP 账户暂停事件，描述时间线、影响及恢复过程。强调基于云凭证的工作流易受影响，需要建立更具韧性的备份与恢复策略。

items.title_en: Show HN: Semble – Code search for agents that uses 98% fewer tokens than grep
items.title_zh: Show HN: Semble——面向代理的代码搜索，使用的 token 比 grep 少 98%
items.summary_en: Semble is a code search tool designed for agents that uses far fewer tokens than grep, enabling more efficient code discovery in AI agent workflows. It demonstrates how smarter indexing can reduce prompt sizes.
items.summary_zh: Semble 是一个为代理优化的代码搜索工具，其所需 token 远少于 grep，提升了 AI 代理工作流中的代码发现效率。展示了更智能的索引如何减小提示尺寸。

items.title_en: GenCAD
items.title_zh: GenCAD
items.summary_en: GenCAD appears to be a project centered on automated CAD generation and design workflows.
items.summary_zh: GenCAD 似乎是一个专注于自动化 CAD 生成与设计工作流的项目。

items.title_en: Map of Metal
items.title_zh: 金属地图
items.summary_en: Map of Metal provides a global, interactive view of critical metals across supply chains, helping engineers and policymakers spot bottlenecks from mining to manufacturing. The project emphasizes supply chain transparency and material substitution as key levers for resilience in tech hardware.
items.summary_zh: 金属地图提供全球关键金属供应链的互动视图，帮助工程师和决策者识别从矿产到制造环节的瓶颈。该项目凸显供应链透明度与材料替代在科技硬件韧性中的关键作用。

items.title_en: On The <dl> (2021)
items.title_zh: 关于 <dl> 标签
items.summary_en: Definition lists encode associations between terms and descriptions using dt and dd. The piece argues for semantic clarity and accessibility best practices, comparing dl to other list types and offering guidance on markup, styling, and screen-reader behavior. Good usage improves parsing for assistive tech and search engines.
items.summary_zh: 定义列表通过 dt 与 dd 将术语与描述相关联。文章强调语义清晰与无障碍访问的最佳实践，比较 dl、ul 等列表的适用场景，并给出标记、样式与屏幕阅读器行为的建议。正确使用能提升辅助技术与搜索引擎的解析效果。

items.title_en: Native all the way, until you need text
items.title_zh: 追求原生体验，直到你需要文本输入
items.summary_en: A debate about when to embrace native interfaces versus web/web-based solutions; native UX reigns for performance and feel, but text input and rich typography often push developers toward web tech. A prudent middle-ground emerges for pragmatic product design.
items.summary_zh: 就原生界面与网页技术的取舍展开讨论：原生 UX 在性能与手感上更强，但文本输入和排版需求常使人转向网页技术。实用的设计取舍在于权衡场景与需求。

items.title_en: I turned a $80 RK3562 Android tablet into a Debian Linux workstation
items.title_zh: 把 80 美元的 RK3562 Android 平板改造成 Debian 工作站
items.summary_en: A budget-friendly hack demonstrates how a low-end Android tablet can become a functional Debian workstation, shedding light on hardware limits, driver support, and the potential for repurposing consumer devices. It shows that with the right setup, cheap hardware can become viable for light development tasks.
items.summary_zh: 用一块低价平板就能跑 Debian，展示了硬件极限、驱动与开源生态对再利用的影响。通过合适的设置，廉价设备也能胜任轻量开发工作。

items.title_en: SpaceX launches Starship v3 rocket
items.title_zh: SpaceX 发射 Starship v3 火箭
items.summary_en: SpaceX successfully launches Starship v3 prototype, marking progress toward high-thrust, reusable orbital capability. Analysts will watch for performance metrics, reusability data, and how the vehicle scales for future missions.
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 成功发射 Starship v3 原型机，标志着朝着高推力、可重复使用的轨道飞行能力迈进。分析师将关注性能指标、重复使用数据，以及该型号未来任务的可扩展性。

items.title_en: Python 3.15: features that didn't make the headlines
items.title_zh: Python 3.15：未被媒体聚焦的功能
items.summary_en: Python 3.15 ships with a handful of low-key improvements that didn’t steal headlines but matter for daily coding. Expect refined error messages, library tweaks, and performance tweaks that subtly boost developer ergonomics without breaking existing code.
items.summary_zh: Python 3.15 带来若干低调但实用的改进，并未成为头条。包括更清晰的错误信息、对标准库的微调，以及对性能与开发体验的提升，现有代码通常无需修改即可受益。

items.title_en: Show HN: I reverse engineered Apple's video wallpapers
items.title_zh: Show HN：我反向工程了苹果的视频壁纸
items.summary_en: A project demonstrates how Apple's video wallpapers are built by reverse engineering; it reveals methods to reproduce or port the dynamic wallpapers outside Apple devices. The work provides ideas for recreating similar features on other platforms.
items.summary_zh: 一个项目展示了如何通过反向工程还原苹果的视频壁纸，揭示了在苹果设备之外重现动态壁纸的方法。该工作为在其他平台移植或再现此特性提供了思路。

items.title_en: How fast is N tokens per second really?
items.title_zh: 每秒 N 个 token 到底有多快？
items.summary_en: A deep dive into token throughput reveals that 'N tokens per second' is highly sensitive to model size, hardware, batching, and software stacks; real-world throughput often trails theoretical peaks. The piece offers practical takeaways for benchmarking and deploying LLMs in production.
items.summary_zh: 对每秒 N 个 token 的吞吐量进行了深入分析，发现吞吐率高度依赖模型规模、硬件和批处理等因素，实际性能常落后于理论峰值。文章给出在生产环境中对基准测试与部署的实用要点。

items.title_en: U.S. researchers face new restrictions on publishing with foreign collaborators
items.title_zh: 美国研究人员在与海外合作者发表论文方面的新限制
items.summary_en: U.S. researchers face new publishing restrictions relating to foreign collaborators. The policy increase creates compliance burden and could chill international collaboration, potentially slowing scientific progress and open science, particularly in dual-use or security-sensitive fields.
items.summary_zh: 新规则要求对海外合作者的学术产出进行额外审查，增加合规成本。此举可能遏制跨国合作，影响开放科学和科研进度，尤其在敏感领域。

items.title_en: Antigravity 2.0 Tops the OpenSCAD Architectural 3D LLM Benchmark
items.title_zh: Antigravity 2.0在OpenSCAD建筑3D LLM基准中夺冠
items.summary_en: Antigravity 2.0 tops an OpenSCAD-based architectural 3D LLM benchmark, suggesting that newer AI-assisted CAD approaches are nearing production-readiness. The result underscores how AI can streamline parametric modeling, but also raises questions about reproducibility and toolchain integration in design pipelines.
items.summary_zh: Antigravity 2.0在OpenSCAD建筑3D的基准测试中夺冠，表明更先进的AI辅助CAD方法接近落地。此结果凸显AI在参数化建模中的潜力，同时也引发对可重复性与设计流程整合的讨论。

items.title_en: AI is a technology not a product
items.title_zh: AI是技术不是产品
items.summary_en: This essay argues that AI is a technology stack rather than a finished product, with implications for regulation, safety, and how organizations adopt AI capabilities rather than chasing packaged apps.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为 AI 只是技术堆栈而非成品，强调在监管、安全和组织采用方面应关注能力而非追逐现成的产品。

items.title_en: Lost Images from the 1945 Trinity Nuclear Test Restored
items.title_zh: 1945 年 Trinity 核试验的影像被修复
items.summary_en: Restoration of Trinity Test era images, previously lost, shows advances in digital restoration and archival fidelity. The find highlights how modern techniques revive a pivotal moment in nuclear history and how researchers can extract new details from degraded photographs.
items.summary_zh: 对 1945 年 Trinity 核试验的影像被找回并修复，体现了数字修复与档案保护技术的进步。此次修复揭示了核历史的细节，研究者也可从退化照片中提取新信息。

items.title_en: Deno 2.8
items.title_zh: Deno 2.8 发布
items.summary_en: Deno 2.8 brings enhancements to the runtime and tooling, including performance improvements and updates that streamline TypeScript development and secure script execution. The release signals continued growth in edge-friendly JS/TS runtimes beyond Node.
items.summary_zh: Deno 2.8 提升了运行时与工具链的性能，优化了 TypeScript 开发体验与脚本执行的安全性。此版本体现了在 Node 之外，面向前端边缘计算的 JavaScript/TypeScript 运行时生态继续扩展。

items.title_en: OpenBSD 7.9
items.title_zh: OpenBSD 7.9 发布
items.summary_en: OpenBSD 7.9 ships with improved security hardening, updated drivers, and new ports, continuing the project's emphasis on correctness and minimalism. The release also expands platform support and performance improvements.
items.summary_zh: OpenBSD 7.9 发布，带来更强的安全强化、更新的驱动以及新端口，延续对正确性与简约设计的坚持。此次版本还扩展了平台支持并带来性能提升。

items.title_en: BambuStudio has been violating PrusaSlicer AGPL license since their fork
items.title_zh: BambuStudio 自分叉以来持续违反 PrusaSlicer 的 AGPL 许可证
items.summary_en: Allegations claim BambuStudio’s fork of PrusaSlicer has violated AGPL by not disclosing source code and complying with copyleft. The dispute highlights OSS licensing risks in the 3D printing software ecosystem and potential impacts on forks relying on upstream projects. If true, it could pressure compliance and affect downstream users.
items.summary_zh: 指控称 BambuStudio 对 PrusaSlicer 的分叉自始至今涉嫌违反 AGPL 许可证，未披露源代码并未遵守 Copyleft 义务。这一纠纷凸显 3D 打印软件生态中的开源许可风险，以及对依赖上游项目的分叉可能产生的影响。若属实，或将推动合规与下游用户的风险评估。

items.title_en: Saying goodbye to asm.js
items.title_zh: 告别 asm.js
items.summary_en: Asm.js, once a performance-boosting subset of JavaScript, is being phased out in favor of WebAssembly. The move reflects the industry shift toward a standardized, near-native execution model and carries implications for legacy projects and tooling. Developers should plan migrations to WebAssembly and update pipelines accordingly.
items.summary_zh: asm.js 作为 JavaScript 的老旧子集正逐步被淘汰，WebAssembly 成为近似原生执行的标准。此举反映了行业向统一高效执行模型的转变，并影响遗留项目与开发流程。开发者应规划迁移至 WebAssembly，并更新构建与工具链。

items.title_en: Wake up! 16b
items.title_zh: 醒来！16b
items.summary_en: A piece titled 'Wake up! 16b' appears to center on a 16-bit/16-byte concept, though the specifics aren’t clear from the title alone.
items.summary_zh: 题为“醒来！16b”的作品似乎聚焦于一个 16 位 / 16 字节的概念，但从标题本身很难判断具体内容。

items.title_en: Gemini CLI will stop working from June 18, 2026
items.title_zh: Gemini CLI 将于 2026 年 6 月 18 日停止工作
items.summary_en: Google announces the Gemini CLI will stop working on a set date, with migration to the Antigravity CLI recommended. It underscores rapid churn in AI tooling ecosystems and the importance of migration planning for automation workflows.
items.summary_zh: Google 宣布 Gemini CLI 将在指定日期停止工作，并建议迁移到 Antigravity CLI。此举显示了 AI 工具生态的快速迭代与迁移规划对自动化工作流的重要性。

items.title_en: The Art of Money Getting
items.title_zh: 赚钱的艺术
items.summary_en: The Art of Money Getting revisits a 19th-century treatise on financial prudence, wealth-building, and frugality. Although old, the book's timeless ideas around disciplined income and risk management offer counterpoints to flashy startup hype.
items.summary_zh: 《赚钱的艺术》回顾一部19世纪关于财务谨慎、致富与节俭的著作，尽管年代久远，其关于纪律性收入与风险管理的思想对现代创业也有启示。

items.title_en: Remove-AI-Watermarks – CLI and library for removing AI watermarks from images
items.title_zh: Remove–AI–Watermarks：用于从图像移除 AI 水印的 CLI 与库
items.summary_en: Open-source CLI and library that remove AI-generated watermarks from images. While useful for legitimate image editing, it raises ethical questions about watermarking, ownership, and the potential for misuse in denying AI authorship claims.
items.summary_zh: 一个开源命令行工具与库，能够从图像中移除 AI 水印。该工具在合法编辑场景有用，但也引发关于水印、所有权及滥用风险的伦理讨论。

items.title_en: Mini Shai-Hulud Strikes Again: 314 npm Packages Compromised
items.title_zh: 小型 Shai‑Hulud 再次来袭：314 个 npm 包被篡改
items.summary_en: A supply-chain intrusion hit the npm ecosystem, compromising 314 packages as part of the Mini Shai-Hulud campaign. The incident underscores the fragility of dependency-heavy tooling and reinforces best practices like lockfiles, trusted maintainers, and regular audits to detect tampering.
items.summary_zh: 小型 Shai-Hulud 攻击再次蔓延，314个 npm 包被入侵篡改。这一事件暴露了依赖密集型工具的脆弱性，强调使用 lockfile、信任的维护者审计以及定期安全检查的重要性。

items.title_en: FiveThirtyEight articles on the Internet Archive
items.title_zh: FiveThirtyEight 的文章被放进互联网档案馆
items.summary_en: FiveThirtyEight articles are being archived by the Internet Archive, ensuring long-term access even if the original site changes. This supports reproducibility and historical analysis in data journalism, while raising questions about licensing and reuse.
items.summary_zh: FiveThirtyEight 的文章被互联网档案馆长期存档，即使原站点发生变化也能访问。这有助于数据新闻的可复现性与历史分析，同时引发关于许可与再利用的讨论。

items.title_en: Shunning AI is the human choice
items.title_zh: 拒绝AI是人类的选择
items.summary_en: An opinion piece argues that resisting AI is a legitimate human choice to protect autonomy, privacy, and accountability in a world of increasing automation. It questions techno-optimism and advocates a cautious, human-centered approach to technology adoption.
items.summary_zh: 文章主张在日益自动化的时代，拒绝AI是一种理性的选择，有助于维护自主权、隐私与问责。它质疑对AI的盲目乐观，倡导更谨慎的人本导向技术采用。

items.title_en: Blog ran on Ubuntu 16.04 for 10 years. I migrated it to FreeBSD
items.title_zh: 博客在 Ubuntu 16.04 上运行了 10 年后迁移到 FreeBSD
items.summary_en: After running a blog on Ubuntu 16.04 for a decade, the author migrated to FreeBSD. The piece outlines what motivated the switch, the technical adjustments involved, and lessons learned about stability, security, and maintenance in a self-hosted stack.
items.summary_zh: 作者在 Ubuntu 16.04 上运行博客十年后迁移至 FreeBSD，分享迁移动机、技术调整以及在自托管环境中关于稳定性、安全性与维护成本的经验教训。

items.title_en: Declining America
items.title_zh: declining America
items.summary_en: A thoughtful essay on perceived decline in the US, touching on demographics, tech policy, or economic headwinds, and its implications for innovation.
items.summary_zh: 这篇深思文章探讨美国日益显现的衰退迹象，涉及人口、科技政策与经济挑战及对创新的影响。

items.title_en: Click (2016)
items.summary_en: A 2016 work centered on click interactions as a lens into human-computer interfaces.
items.summary_zh: 一部聚焦点击交互、以此观察人机界面的2016年作品。

items.title_en: College students drown out AI-praising commencement speeches with boos
items.title_zh: 大学生用嘘声抵制AI吹捧的毕业致辞
items.summary_en: College students boo AI-promoting commencement speeches, signaling skepticism about hype surrounding AI's role in society. The backlash suggests audiences want more pragmatic, nuanced discussions rather than glänzende hype, even at ceremonial events. It reflects ongoing tensions between academia and industry narratives about AI.
items.summary_zh: 大学生在对AI吹捧的毕业致辞中发出嘘声，表明对AI在社会角色的热炒持怀疑态度。此举表明观众更期待务实、细致的讨论，而非在仪式场合中的过度炒作，反映出学术界与产业对AI叙事的张力。

items.title_en: Show HN: Freenet, a peer-to-peer platform for decentralized apps
items.title_zh: Show HN：Freenet——用于去中心化应用的点对点平台
items.summary_en: Freenet is proposed as a peer-to-peer platform for decentralized apps, offering a way to run software beyond centralized app stores. It faces practical questions around performance, security, and app discovery in real-world use.
items.summary_zh: Freenet 是一个去中心化应用的点对点平台，旨在绕过集中式应用商店运行应用。 在现实场景中，它仍面临性能、安全性和应用发现等实际问题。

items.title_en: Waymo pauses Atlanta service as its robotaxis keep driving into floods
items.title_zh: Waymo 在亚特兰大暂停服务，因为机器人出租车继续在洪水中行驶
items.summary_en: Waymo pauses Atlanta service after robotaxis repeatedly drive into floods, highlighting safety and reliability challenges for autonomous fleets in extreme weather.
items.summary_zh: Waymo 在亚特兰大暂停服务，原因是机器人出租车在洪水中多次行驶，暴露出自动驾驶车在极端天气条件下的安全与可靠性挑战。

items.title_en: We let AIs run radio stations
items.title_zh: 让 AI 运营广播电台
items.summary_en: Andon Labs demonstrates AI-operated radio stations, where AI curates playlists and hosts content with automated narration. The project probes how far automation can go in media, and what remains uniquely human in storytelling and curation.
items.summary_zh: Andon Labs 展示了让 AI 运营广播电台的尝试，AI 负责选曲并进行自动化主持。该项目探索媒体领域自动化的边界，以及在叙事与选曲方面仍需人工介入的部分。

items.title_en: Eric Schmidt speech about AI booed during graduation
items.title_zh: 前 Google CEO 施密特在毕业典礼就 AI 的讲话遭遇哄笑
items.summary_en: Eric Schmidt’s AI-themed graduation remarks were booed, signaling skepticism about the AI hype among students. The moment reflects broader tensions between industry optimism and concerns about automation's impact on jobs and society.
items.summary_zh: 施密特在毕业典礼上就 AI 的讲话遭遇嘘声，显示学生群体对 AI 热潮的怀疑情绪。此刻折射出行业乐观情绪与对自动化对就业及社会影响的担忧之间的紧张。

items.title_en: Vivaldi 8.0
items.title_zh: Vivaldi 8.0
items.summary_en: Vivaldi 8.0 is a major desktop release that doubles down on customization and efficiency. It brings UI tweaks, performance improvements, and expanded built-in tools to help power users tailor their browsing workflow.
items.summary_zh: Vivaldi 8.0 是桌面端的一次重大发布，继续强化自定义和效率。此次更新带来界面细节的优化、性能提升，以及扩展的内置工具，面向希望定制化浏览工作流的高阶用户。

items.title_en: Memory has grown to nearly two-thirds of AI chip component costs
items.title_zh: AI 芯片成本中内存占比近三分之二
items.summary_en: New cost data show memory accounts for about two-thirds of AI chip component costs, making memory the dominant design and pricing driver as models grow. This shifts emphasis to memory bandwidth, efficiency, and novel memory tech, as chips compete on how well they feed large AI workloads.
items.summary_zh: 最新成本数据表明，内存约占 AI 芯片组件成本的三分之二，成为主导的设计和定价驱动力。随着模型规模增大，厂商更关注内存带宽、效率以及新型内存技术，以提高对大规模 AI workload 的供给能力。

items.title_en: Japan is gripped by mass allergies. A 1950s project is to blame
items.title_zh: 日本大规模花粉过敏归咎于1950年代的一项计划
items.summary_en: Decades-old project in the 1950s is linked to today's mass allergy problem in Japan. The article traces how early experiments altered pollen ecosystems or health outcomes and why legacy decisions matter for science policy and public health. It highlights how long tail effects from past research can shape present-day living conditions.
items.summary_zh: 日本因1950年代的一项研究计划而引发的花粉过敏问题在今日仍有显著影响。文章追溯早期实验如何改变花粉生态或健康结果，以及历史决策对科学政策和公共卫生的意义，强调过去研究的长期影响会塑造当下的生活环境。

items.title_en: Project Glasswing: what Mythos showed us
items.title_zh: Glasswing 项目：Mythos 给我们的启示
items.summary_en: Mythos demonstrates a new approach to cybersecurity tooling with Glasswing, showcasing how frontier models can assist threat hunting and incident response. The project illustrates how AI models integrated with domain-specific data can accelerate cognitive tasks in security operations, while highlighting limits like data sensitivity and model hallucination. It signals a trend: domain-specific AI tooling for cybersecurity is moving from concept to practice.
items.summary_zh: Mythos 的 Glasswing 展示了将前沿模型应用于网络安全工具的新思路，覆盖从威胁狩猎到事件响应的场景。该项目凸显了将 AI 模型与领域数据结合以提升安全运维认知任务的潜力，同时也提醒数据敏感性与模型可信性等局限。预示着以安全领域为目标的 AI 工具正从概念走向落地。

items.title_en: DOS Zone
items.title_zh: DOS Zone 站点
items.summary_en: DOS Zone is a hub for DOS-themed tooling and resources.
items.summary_zh: DOS Zone 是一个专注于 DOS 主题工具与资源的聚合平台。

items.title_en: A nicer voltmeter clock
items.title_zh: 更好看的电压表时钟
items.summary_en: An electronics project that pairs a voltmeter display with a clock, delivering a visually appealing, informative gadget. It showcases playful hardware tinkering and practical time-keeping.
items.summary_zh: 一个电子制作项目，将电压表显示与时钟结合，呈现出既美观又实用的小装置，展示了有趣的硬件玩家精神与实用计时。

items.title_en: Iran starts Bitcoin-backed ship insurance for Hormuz strait
items.title_zh: 伊朗为霍尔木兹海峡船运推出比特币背书的保险
items.summary_en: Iran launches shipping insurance backed by Bitcoin for vessels through the Strait of Hormuz. The crypto-backed instrument offers an alternative risk transfer tool amid sanctions and regional instability, signaling crypto's growing role in traditional finance and risk management.
items.summary_zh: 伊朗为通过霍尔木兹海峡的船舶推出比特币背书的保险，这一以加密货币为担保的保险工具为制裁与区域不稳局势下的风险转移提供了替代方案，体现加密货币在传统金融与风险管理中的日益嵌入。

items.title_en: My two-part desk setup (2025)
items.title_zh: 我的两段式桌面设置
items.summary_en: The post walks through a two-part desk setup, detailing how the space is split for different tasks and how the author manages desks, monitors, and cables. It offers practical tips on layout, ergonomics, and modular organization that boost focus and comfort.
items.summary_zh: 文中描述了一个分为两部分的桌面工作区，分工明确、设备分区和线缆管理被讲解清楚。提供了关于布局、人体工学和模块化整理的实用建议，帮助提升专注与舒适度。

items.title_en: AI has a multiplying effect on existing technical skills
items.title_zh: AI对现有技术技能具有放大效应
items.summary_en: AI amplifies existing technical skills by accelerating discovery and automation, turning familiar workflows into higher-leverage activities. The takeaway is to align learning with tools that complement human judgment and to emphasize skills that scale with AI, like system design and critical thinking.
items.summary_zh: 人工智能放大了现有技术能力，提升了发现速度和自动化水平，将熟练的工作流变成更高杠杆的活动。核心建议是将学习聚焦于与AI协同的技能，如系统设计与批判性思维等，形成可与AI共成长的能力结构。

items.title_en: Mistral AI acquires Emmi AI
items.title_zh: Mistral AI 收购 Emmi AI 打造领先的 AI 技术栈
items.summary_en: Mistral AI acquires Emmi AI to assemble an end-to-end AI stack, combining models, tooling, and deployment capabilities to accelerate product development and enterprise use. The acquisition signals consolidation in the AI tooling ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Mistral AI 收购 Emmi AI，意在打造端到端的 AI 技术栈，整合模型、工具与部署能力，加速产品开发与企业落地。此举标志着 AI 工具生态的整合加速。

items.title_en: Google’s AI is being manipulated. The search giant is quietly fighting back
items.title_zh: 谷歌的 AI 正在被操控，搜索巨头悄然反击
items.summary_en: The article reports ongoing attempts to manipulate Google's AI-powered search results and describes how Google is quietly defending against manipulation with model hardening, policy updates, and improved signals. It underlines the fragility of search integrity in the age of AI.
items.summary_zh: 文章报道有针对 Google AI 搜索结果的操控尝试，描述了 Google 如何通过模型加强、策略更新和信号改进等方式进行防御。强调在 AI 时代，搜索结果的完整性更容易受到影响。

items.title_en: OpenAI Adopts Google's SynthID Watermark for AI Images with Verification Tool
items.title_zh: OpenAI 采用 Google 的 SynthID 图像水印并提供验证工具
items.summary_en: OpenAI integrates Google's SynthID watermark into AI-generated images and ships a verification tool to prove AI origin. This marks a shift toward verifiable content provenance and could influence platform policies, authentication tooling, and public trust in AI-generated media.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 将 Google 的 SynthID 图像水印嵌入 AI 生成的图像，并提供验证工具以证明来源。这标志着对内容可验证出处的重视，有望影响平台策略、认证工具和公众对 AI 生成媒体的信任。

items.title_en: The FBI Wants to Buy Nationwide Access to License Plate Readers
items.title_zh: 联邦调查局拟全国范围购买车牌识别系统访问权
items.summary_en: Covers a government-wide push by the FBI to acquire nationwide access to license plate reader data. It also touches implications for vendors building apps that rely on LPR data.
items.summary_zh: 报道 FBI 求购全国范围的车牌识别数据访问权，讨论相关隐私与公民自由风险，以及广泛数据访问可能带来的监控扩张。并点出对依赖车牌识别数据的应用开发者的潜在影响。

items.title_en: Uv is fantastic, but its package management UX is a mess
items.title_zh: Uv 的功能很棒，但包管理用户体验混乱
items.summary_en: Praises UV for its capabilities but criticizes the package management user experience, noting issues with discoverability, dependency handling, or onboarding. The post suggests improvements and lessons for packaging tool design.
items.summary_zh: 赞扬 UV 的强大功能，但批评其包管理的用户体验混乱，指出发现、依赖管理或上手流程等方面的问题。文中提出改进建议与对包管理工具设计的启示。

items.title_en: News outlets are limiting the Internet Archive’s access to their journalism
items.title_zh: 更多新闻机构限制互联网档案馆访问其新闻内容
items.summary_en: More than 340 local news outlets are limiting the Internet Archive's access to their journalism, raising concerns about long-term preservation, research access, and the sustainability of preserving local reporting.
items.summary_zh: 超过 340 家地方新闻机构限制互联网档案馆对其新闻内容的访问，引发关于长期保存、研究可及性以及地方报道可持续性的担忧。文章讨论版权、授权与数字新闻生态系统中对存档访问的阻碍。

items.title_en: Show HN: Auto-identity-remove – Automated data broker opt-out runner for macOS
items.title_zh: Show HN：Auto-identity-remove——用于 macOS 的自动化数据经纪人退出工具
items.summary_en: Auto-identity-remove is an open-source macOS tool that automates opt-out requests to data brokers, aiming to reduce personal data exposure. It demonstrates a practical approach to privacy hygiene with automation.
items.summary_zh: Auto-identity-remove 是一个开源的 macOS 工具，自动化向数据经纪人提交退出请求，旨在降低个人数据暴露。它展示了通过自动化实现隐私卫生的实用方法。

items.title_en: Haiku OS runs on M1 Macs now
items.title_zh: Haiku OS 现可在 M1 Macs 上运行
items.summary_en: Haiku OS, a BeOS-inspired open-source system, now demonstrates running on Apple Silicon M1 Macs, marking progress in ARM64 support for this project. The update highlights the ongoing porting efforts and the challenges of booting modern Macs with niche operating systems.
items.summary_zh: Haiku OS 作为 BeOS 启发的开源系统，现已在 Apple Silicon 的 M1 Mac 上运行，标志着其 ARM64 支持的进展。该进展凸显了持续的移植工作以及在现代 Mac 硬件上引导小众操作系统所面临的挑战。

items.title_en: Gemini Omni
items.title_zh: Gemini Omni
items.summary_en: Gemini Omni is a versatile, cross-domain model that unifies tools, reasoning, and multi-modal inputs, signaling Google’s effort to provide a single powerful AI assistant across tasks. It emphasizes memory, tool use, and cross-domain capabilities.
items.summary_zh: Gemini Omni 是一个多模态、多领域的通用模型，整合工具、推理与多模态输入，体现谷歌在打造全栈 AI 助手上的努力。它强调记忆、工具使用和跨领域能力。

items.title_en: Actually, democracy dies in H.R.
items.title_zh: 民主其实死在 HR 里
items.summary_en: The piece argues that HR processes can quietly undermine democratic norms within organizations, through centralized control, surveillance, and opaque decision-making. It connects these patterns to broader concerns about democracy and calls for greater employee participation and governance safeguards.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出人力资源流程可能通过集权、监控和隐性决策等方式侵蚀组织内部的民主原则，与更广泛的民主健康相关。呼吁加强员工参与、治理保障与透明度提升。

items.title_en: Apple Silicon costs more than OpenRouter
items.title_zh: Apple Silicon 成本高于 OpenRouter
items.summary_en: A comparison of energy efficiency and cost when running offline LLMs shows that consumer Apple Silicon may incur higher energy use or cost than purpose-built OpenRouter setups. Practical implications for on-device AI planning and hardware strategy.
items.summary_zh: 对离线运行的 AI 模型进行能耗与成本比较，表明 Apple Silicon 在离线推理上可能不如专用的 OpenRouter 设置高效或经济。为在设备端部署 AI 的硬件策略提供实际启示。

items.title_en: BBEdit 16
items.title_zh: BBEdit 16 版
items.summary_en: BBEdit 16 modernizes a long-running macOS text editor with refreshed workflows and improved editing tools, including better handling of large files and built-in Git integration. It signals continued value for desktop, local-workflow developers who prefer precise, private tooling.
items.summary_zh: BBEdit 16 对长期存在的 macOS 文本编辑器进行了现代化升级，提升了编辑工作流、对大型文件的处理能力，并强化了与 Git 的集成。 这一更新强调了在注重本地工作流的开发者与作者群体中，桌面工具仍具备不可替代的价值。

items.title_en: Why is Vivado 2026.1 dropping Linux support for free tier?
items.title_zh: 为什么 Vivado 2026.1 版本不再为免费版提供 Linux 支持？
items.summary_en: Vivado 2026.1 will drop Linux support for its free tier, cutting off Linux users from the no-cost FPGA design tool. The change pushes hobbyists, students, and small teams toward paid options or alternative ecosystems, highlighting the fragility of vendor-supplied open tooling. The move raises questions about accessibility and cross-platform support in critical design software.
items.summary_zh: Vivado 2026.1 将不再为免费版提供 Linux 支持，意味着 Linux 用户将无法使用这款无成本的 FPGA 设计工具。此变动可能迫使业余爱好者、学生和小团队转向付费版本或寻找替代方案，凸显了依赖厂商的跨平台开工具的脆弱性。此举引发关于可访问性与跨平台支持在关键设计软件中的讨论。

items.title_en: Peter Neumann has died
items.title_zh: 彼得·诺伊曼去世
items.summary_en: Peter G. Neumann, a longtime observer and author on computer security risks, has died. His work on computer-related risks shaped how engineers approach safety, reliability, and policy in software and networks. His writings and talks continue to influence risk management practices in software and cybersecurity.
items.summary_zh: 彼得·诺伊曼是一位长期关注并著作 Computer Related Risks 的计算机科学家，其关于计算机安全风险的工作影响了工程师对软件与网络安全、可靠性与政策的思考。他的著作和演讲继续影响软件与网络安全领域的风险管理实践。

items.title_en: It is time to give up the dualism introduced by the debate on consciousness
items.title_zh: 放弃意识辩论中引入的二元论
items.summary_en: Philosophical piece urging readers to drop the traditional mind–body dualism invoked by debates about consciousness. It argues for a monist or non-dual framework that treats consciousness as emergent from physical processes, challenging long-standing dichotomies.
items.summary_zh: 本文呼吁放弃在意识辩论中常见的二元论思维，主张以更贴近物理过程的单一框架来理解意识。通过将意识视为物理过程的涌现，挑战长期存在的二分法。

items.title_en: Anthropic is expanding to Colossus2. Will use GB200
items.title_zh: Anthropic 将扩展至 Colossus2，将使用 GB200
items.summary_en: Anthropic expands to Colossus2 with GB200, signaling a push for larger AI compute resources. The move underscores ongoing scaling needs for safety-focused AI research and production workloads.
items.summary_zh: Anthropic 将扩展至 Colossus2，并将使用 GB200，这体现了对更大规模AI算力的需求。此举可能推动更大模型的研发与部署。

items.title_en: Show HN: Audiomass – a free, open-source multitrack audio editor for the web
items.title_zh: Show HN：Audiomass——一个免费开源的网页多轨音频编辑器
items.summary_en: Audiomass is a free, open-source multitrack audio editor that runs entirely in your browser. It offers a simple timeline and essential editing tools with no installation, making quick editing and sharing easy for web users. Being open-source, it invites community contributions and transparency.
items.summary_zh: Audiomass 是一个免费、开源的浏览器端多轨音频编辑器，完全在浏览器中运行，无需安装即可完成编辑与导出。它提供简单的时间线和基本编辑工具，便于快速处理和分享音频，社区贡献也更易参与。

items.title_en: Pope Leo XIV’s first encyclical Magnifica humanitas to be published May 25
items.title_zh: 教皇利奥十四世的首部通谕 Magnifica humanitas 将于5月25日发布
items.summary_en: Announces the forthcoming publication of Pope Leo XIV's first encyclical Magnifica humanitas, outlining expected themes around human dignity and social charity.
items.summary_zh: 梵蒂冈宣布教皇利奥十四世的首部通谕 Magnifica humanitas 将于5月25日公布，预计聚焦人类尊严与社会慈善等主题。

items.title_en: Amazon Web Services – Four Years and Out
items.title_zh: AWS：四年后退场
items.summary_en: A retrospective on a four-year run with Amazon Web Services and the reasons behind its termination.
items.summary_zh: 对一个在 AWS 上持续了四年的项目的回顾，揭示其终止的原因。

items.title_en: Cleve Moler has died
items.title_zh: 克里夫·莫勒去世
items.summary_en: Cleve Moler, co-founder of MathWorks and the creator of MATLAB, has died. His work helped democratize numerical computing and shaped how engineers and scientists learn linear algebra and numerical methods through accessible software. His influence extends across education and industry alike.
items.summary_zh: MathWorks 联合创始人兼 MATLAB 的创始人之一克里夫·莫勒去世。他的工作让数值计算走进更多人手中，并通过易用的软件改变了工程和科学家学习线性代数与数值方法的方式，其影响覆盖教育与工业界。

items.title_en: Cursor Introduces Composer 2.5
items.title_zh: Cursor 推出 Composer 2.5
items.summary_en: Cursor released Composer 2.5, adding improvements to the AI agent toolchain, such as better task orchestration, reliability, and debugging. The update helps developers build more capable agents with fewer edge-case issues.
items.summary_zh: Cursor 发布了 Composer 2.5，带来改进的 AI 代理工具链，如更好的任务编排、稳定性与调试能力。更新帮助开发者构建更强大的代理，减少边缘情况问题。

items.title_en: The Letter S, by Donald Knuth (1980) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 唐纳德·克努斯的字母 S（1980）[PDF]
items.summary_en: Donald Knuth's 1980 essay on the letter S dives into typography, shape, and legibility, reflecting the craft behind printed text. It remains a touchstone for typographers and designers alike.
items.summary_zh: 1980 年，Knuth 的《字母 S》探讨了字形、可读性和排版技艺，揭示了印刷文字背后的匠心。该文成为字体设计领域的经典参考。

items.title_en: Scammers are abusing an internal Microsoft account to send spam links
items.title_zh: 骗子滥用微软内部账户发送垃圾链接
items.summary_en: Scammers are abusing an internal Microsoft account to send spam links, illustrating how insider access points can be weaponized in phishing campaigns. The incident underscores the need for stronger internal controls, monitoring, and rapid incident response to prevent abuse from affecting users and partners.
items.summary_zh: 骗子滥用微软内部账户发送垃圾链接，暴露了内部权限也会被滥用的风险。事件凸显加强内部控制、监控和快速处置以防止滥用扩散的必要性。

items.title_en: Oura says it gets government demands for user data
items.title_zh: Oura 表示收到政府对用户数据的请求。它会公开数量吗？
items.summary_en: Wearable makers face government data requests; this piece examines transparency and whether Oura will disclose the volume of requests. It discusses privacy trade-offs, regulatory pressures, and how vendors balance user trust with compliance.
items.summary_zh: 可穿戴厂商会收到政府数据请求，文章探讨透明度以及 Oura 是否会披露请求数量。分析隐私取舍、监管压力，以及厂商在合规与用户信任之间的权衡。

items.title_en: AI eats the world (Spring 26) [pdf]
items.title_zh: AI 吃掉了世界（2026 春季版）[PDF]
items.summary_en: A 2026 AI landscape report surveying adoption, risks, and policy implications across industries, offering a snapshot of how AI investments are evolving globally.
items.summary_zh: 一份2026年 AI 现状报告，梳理各行业的普及、风险与政策含义，提供全球 AI 投资演变的快照。

items.title_en: I found ultra-pure quantum crystals in an abandoned mine in the Atacama desert
items.title_zh: 在阿塔卡马沙漠的废弃矿井中发现超纯量子晶体
items.summary_en: Ultra-pure quantum crystals were reportedly found in an abandoned mine in the Atacama Desert, raising questions about material provenance for quantum tech. Such crystals could provide stable substrates for quantum experiments and sensors, but their rarity highlights broader supply-chain challenges in quantum hardware.
items.summary_zh: 在阿塔卡马沙漠的废弃矿井里发现超纯量子晶体的经历引发了关于量子技术材料来源的讨论。此类晶体若用于量子比特或高纯度基底，可能提升设备稳定性，但也暴露了极端环境下材料获取与证据记录的重要性。

items.title_en: Who will buy your services if you fire us all?
items.title_zh: 如果你把我们全都解雇，谁来买你的服务？
items.summary_en: The piece argues that aggressive outsourcing or mass layoffs undermine long-term customer value, as vendors risk losing the relationship, trust, and capability to deliver. It stresses sustainable staffing and human-centric service as a competitive differentiator.
items.summary_zh: 文章指出，过度裁员或大规模外包会削弱长期客户价值，因为失去关系、信任与交付能力。强调以人本、可持续的人员配置提供服务，避免因削减成本而损害客户信任。

items.title_en: Anna's Archive hit with $19.5M default judgment and global domain takedown order
items.title_zh: 安娜的档案因1950万美元的默认判决及全球域名下架令
items.summary_en: A court awarded $19.5 million in a default judgment against Anna's Archive and issued a global domain takedown order. The ruling demonstrates the aggressive legal tools copyright holders can use to shut down piracy hubs online, raising questions about enforcement reach and due process in cross-border cases.
items.summary_zh: 法院对安娜的档案站作出1950万美元的默认判决，并发出全球域名下架令。此案展示了版权方可动用的强力执法手段来关闭海盗型域名，以及此类跨境执法在程序公正和全球范围内的影响。

items.title_en: Where Are the Vibecoded Photoshops?
items.title_zh: 在哪里能找到 Vibecoded Photoshop 图像？
items.summary_en: The piece investigates the status of Vibecoded Photoshop works and what it means for image provenance and authenticity amid evolving manipulation tech.
items.summary_zh: 本文探究 Vibecoded Photoshop 图像的现状，以及在日益成熟的图像操控技术背景下，对图像出处与真实性可能带来的影响。

items.title_en: Italy moves to Airbus A330 tankers
items.title_zh: 意大利转向 Airbus A330 加油机
items.summary_en: Italy moves to Airbus A330 MRTT tankers to strengthen NATO interoperability and modernize its aerial refueling fleet. The choice aligns with European defense procurement trends and affects how Italy supports allied missions.
items.summary_zh: 意大利将采购 Airbus A330 MRTT 加油机，提升空中加油能力并增强与北约的协同作战能力。这一选择符合欧洲防务采购的现代化趋势，将影响意大利对盟军行动的支援能力。

items.title_en: 80386 microcode disassembled
items.title_zh: 80386 微码拆解
items.summary_en: Disassembling the 80386 microcode sheds light on how early x86 processors implemented instructions and durations. It reveals the architectural design decisions behind the era's performance tricks and has relevance for retrocomputing and security research.
items.summary_zh: 对 80386 微码的拆解揭示了早期 x86 处理器如何实现指令及周期。揭示了当时的体系结构设计选择、性能取巧，以及对后世的 retrocomputing 与安全研究的影响。

items.title_en: CISA tries to contain data leak
items.title_zh: 立法者在 CISA 力图遏制数据泄露之际要求提供答复
items.summary_en: Lawmakers demand answers as CISA works to contain a data leak. The exchange highlights political oversight over federal cybersecurity responses and accountability for disclosure timelines, raising questions about transparency and effectiveness.
items.summary_zh: 立法者对 CISA 在遏制数据泄露过程中的行动要求解释和信息。此事凸显对联邦网络安全响应的监督与披露时效的问责，也引发对透明度与效果的关注。

items.title_en: Tesla Solar Roof is on life support as it pivot to panels
items.title_zh: 特斯拉太阳能屋顶陷入生死边缘，转而聚焦太阳能板
items.summary_en: Tesla Solar Roof is on life support as it pivots to traditional panels; the premium roof product has faced cost and installation hurdles, pushing the company to focus on conventional PV. This shift may accelerate adoption of standard panels and reshape expectations for building-integrated photovoltaics.
items.summary_zh: 特斯拉太阳能屋顶在成本与安装难题面前陷入难题，转而重点推进传统太阳能板。此举或将加速传统面板的普及，并改变建筑一体化光伏的市场预期。

items.title_en: GitHub Compromised
items.title_zh: GitHub 遭遇系统安全妥协
items.summary_en: GitHub disclosed a security compromise affecting its systems, highlighting ongoing risks for developers relying on the platform. The incident underscores the importance of robust access controls, monitoring, and rapid incident response in modern software development environments.
items.summary_zh: GitHub 披露其系统遭遇安全妥协，凸显开发者对该平台的安全依赖仍面临的风险。此事件强调在现代软件开发环境中持续强化访问控制、监控与快速事件响应的重要性。

items.title_en: Show HN: I Dedicated 4 Years to Mastering Offline Password Cracking
items.title_zh: Show HN：我花 4 年时间专研离线密码破解
items.summary_en: Show HN: Four-year deep dive into offline password cracking shares methods, hardware, and tradeoffs for offline password testing. It offers a look into practical defensive research and the importance of strong authentication in the face of offline attack capabilities.
items.summary_zh: Show HN 展示作者花费四年时间深潜离线密码破解，分享方法、硬件与权衡。内容揭示离线攻击能力的现实影响，以及在防御层面提升强认证的重要性。

items.title_en: Using Kagi Search with Low Vision
items.title_zh: 在低视力条件下使用 Kagi Search
items.summary_en: Examines how Kagi Search works for users with low vision, highlighting accessible UI decisions, contrast, and keyboard navigation. It offers practical tweaks and reflections on how search UX can better serve users with visual impairments.
items.summary_zh: 从低视力视角评测 Kagi Search 的无障碍设计，聚焦对比度与键盘导航等要素，并提出可操作的调整建议，讨论搜索体验如何更好地服务视觉障碍用户。

items.title_en: A Wayland Compositor in Minecraft
items.title_zh: Minecraft 中的 Wayland 合成器
items.summary_en: A Minecraft mod demonstrates a conceptual Wayland-style compositor inside the game, mapping windowing concepts to in-game UI and interactions. The effort serves as a playful, tangible experiment in OS concepts and cross-domain interoperability.
items.summary_zh: 一个 Minecraft 模组在游戏内演示了类 Wayland 的合成器概念，将窗口管理的思路映射到游戏界面与交互之中。这一尝试以游戏化的方式探索操作系统概念与跨域协作的可能性。

items.title_en: Trump Mobile exposed customers' personal data
items.title_zh: Trump Mobile 暴露客户个人数据
items.summary_en: Trump Mobile confirmed a data exposure affecting customers, including phone numbers and home addresses. The incident underscores how telecom providers and related services can leak sensitive PII, fueling risks of doxxing and phishing until proper patches and incident response are in place. Regulators and customers are watching how the company responds and remedies potential harm.
items.summary_zh: Trump Mobile 确认发生数据暴露，涉及客户的电话、家庭地址等敏感信息。此事件凸显电信及相关服务在数据处理上的风险，可能被用于钓鱼或身份暴露，需尽快修补并完善事件响应机制。监管和用户将关注公司如何应对并降低潜在损害。

items.title_en: Open source Kanban desktop app that runs parallel agents on every card
items.title_zh: 开源看板桌面应用：每张卡片并行运行代理
items.summary_en: A desktop open-source Kanban app runs parallel agents on every card, enabling automation on tasks. This architecture lets each card spawn lightweight AI agents to perform actions like drafting, data gathering, or reminders, potentially changing how teams automate workflows.
items.summary_zh: 该桌面看板应用在每张卡片上并行运行代理，实现对任务的自动化处理。卡片级代理可执行草拟内容、信息采集或提醒等任务，或将工作流自动化推向新水平。

items.title_en: Prolog Basics Explained with Pokémon
items.title_zh: 用口袋妖怪讲解 Prolog 基础
items.summary_en: An approachable dive into Prolog's logic programming through Pokémon examples, making abstract concepts tangible for newcomers. The post blends playful illustrations with practical rule-based reasoning.
items.summary_zh: 用口袋妖怪的示例讲解 Prolog 的逻辑编程，让抽象概念变得直观。文章将生动的案例与基于规则的推理结合起来，便于初学者上手。

items.title_en: Intuit to lay off over 3k employees to refocus on AI
items.title_zh: Intuit 将裁员超过 3000 人以聚焦 AI
items.summary_en: Intuit to lay off more than 3,000 employees to pivot toward AI, signaling a broader trend of AI-driven transformation among software firms. The layoffs may affect product teams and reshape internal priorities around automation and data products.
items.summary_zh: Intuit 将裁员超过3000人以聚焦AI，显示软件公司向AI驱动的转型趋势。这一举措可能影响产品团队并重塑对自动化与数据产品的内部优先级。

items.title_en: Is AI Profitable Yet?
items.title_zh: AI 真的盈利了吗？
items.summary_en: While AI spend is up, there’s no universal profitability yet. ROI hinges on how AI is integrated into core processes, data quality, and the ability to monetize outcomes; many initiatives struggle with compute costs, data handling, and governance. For tech leaders, the message is to prove business value with concrete metrics before scaling.
items.summary_zh: 尽管 AI 投入增加，但尚无普遍的盈利结论。投资回报取决于 AI 与核心流程的整合、数据质量以及成果变现的能力；许多项目仍受制于算力成本、数据管理与治理。对技术领袖而言，应以具体指标证明业务价值再进行放量。

items.title_en: Two computers, one monitor, zero fiddling (2025)
items.title_zh: 两台电脑，一块显示器，零干扰切换（2025）
items.summary_en: A KVM-based setup lets you share a single monitor between two computers with seamless switching and minimal fuss.
items.summary_zh: 基于 KVM 的设置实现两台电脑共用一个显示器，切换无感、使用成本极低。文章给出优化双机工作流的实用技巧，包括键鼠共享及潜在的延迟权衡。

items.title_en: A Bipartisan Amendment Would End Police License Plate Tracking Nationwide
items.title_zh: 两党拟议法案将全面禁止警方车牌追踪
items.summary_en: A bipartisan amendment aims to end nationwide police license plate tracking, curbing the use of plate readers and limiting cross-agency data sharing. The move addresses privacy concerns while weighing how data-driven policing should be regulated.
items.summary_zh: 两党拟议的修正案旨在全面禁止警方车牌追踪，限制车牌识别设备的使用与跨机构数据共享。此举在关注隐私的同时，也在思考数据驱动的治安执法应如何监管。

items.title_en: Samsung chip workers will get an average $340k bonus as AI profits soar
items.title_zh: 随着 AI 盈利飙升，三星芯片工人将获均薪34万美元奖金
items.summary_en: Samsung is awarding average bonuses around $340k to chip-workers as AI-driven profits rise. The payout illustrates how AI demand is boosting semiconductor margins and how companies reward critical manufacturing roles.
items.summary_zh: 随着 AI 相关利润上升，三星芯片部门工人将获得约34万美元的奖金，凸显 AI 需求提升对半导体利润的拉动，以及企业对关键制造岗位的激励。

items.title_en: Qwen 3.7 Preview
items.title_zh: Qwen 3.7 预览
items.summary_en: Alibaba's Qwen 3.7 preview reveals improvements in reasoning, multilingual support, and safety, continuing to advance open AI copilots. The release hints at how enterprise AI stacks will evolve with stronger safety features and integration.
items.summary_zh: 阿里巴巴的 Qwen 3.7 预览在推理能力、多语言支持和安全性方面有所提升，继续推动开放式 AI 助手的发展。版本透露，企业级 AI 架构将通过更强的安全特性与集成进一步演进。

items.title_en: Experience: We found a baby on the subway – now he's our 26-year-old son
items.title_zh: 在地铁捡到的婴儿，如今已成为我们26岁的儿子
items.summary_en: A family recounts finding a baby on the subway and the decades-long path that led to that child becoming their son at 26.
items.summary_zh: 一家人在地铁里偶遇婴儿，经过数十年的发展，这个孩子如今成了他们的儿子。故事揭示了亲情的不可预测性以及陌生情感如何在出人意料的时刻孕育成家庭。

items.title_en: US employers spend more than $1.5B a year to fight labor unions, report finds
items.title_zh: 美国雇主每年花超过15亿美元打压工会，报告显示
items.summary_en: A new report tallies more than $1.5 billion spent annually by U.S. employers to oppose labor unions. The figures reflect extensive lobbying, legal strategies, and HR tactics that shape workers’ organizing power and wage growth.
items.summary_zh: 最新报告统计美国雇主每年在打压工会上的花费超过15亿美元。数字揭示了广泛的游说、诉讼与人力资源策略，这些做法直接影响工会动员力和薪资增长。

items.title_en: Two EA-18 fighter jets collide at Mountain Home airshow, pilots ejected safely
items.title_zh: 山地家园空军基地航空表演中两架 EA-18 战斗机相撞，飞行员均安全弹出
items.summary_en: Two EA-18 fighter jets collided during an air show at Mountain Home AFB, with both pilots ejecting safely. The incident will trigger an official investigation and could affect future safety procedures at civilian-military air shows.
items.summary_zh: 在 Mountain Home 空军基地的航空表演中，两架 EA-18 战斗机相撞，飞行员均安全弹出。事件将启动官方调查，可能影响未来军民航空表演的安全措施。

items.title_en: Colossus: The Forbin Project
items.title_zh: Colossus：Forbin 项目
items.summary_en: Colossus imagines a self-aware defense computer and its consequences, a landmark work in AI-future fiction; the piece connects early cybernetic visions with modern AI governance debates.
items.summary_zh: Colossus 设想了一个具备自我意识的防御性计算机及其后果，是 AI 未来题材中的里程碑之作，与现代人工智能治理辩论存在呼应。

items.title_en: Hosting a website on an 8-bit microcontroller
items.title_zh: 在 8 位微控制器上托管网站
items.summary_en: Running a website from an 8-bit microcontroller demonstrates extreme constraints and ingenuity; while practical for tiny pages, it reveals limitations in networking, memory, and software ecosystems. A niche but instructive look at minimal hardware hosting.
items.summary_zh: 在 8 位微控制器上托管网站展示了极端的资源限制和创意实现。虽然适用于极简页面，但暴露了网络、内存与软件生态的局限性。

items.title_en: I Miss Terry Pratchett
items.title_zh: 我怀念特里·普莱切特
items.summary_en: A personal reflection on the late Terry Pratchett and the lasting impact of his work. The piece celebrates his wit, imaginative storytelling, and the way his books continue to influence readers and writers alike.
items.summary_zh: 对已故作家特里·普莱切特的深情缅怀，回顾他的机智、丰富的想象力以及作品对读者和创作者的持续影响。

items.title_en: Microsoft reports AI is more expensive than paying human employees
items.title_zh: 微软称 AI 的成本高于雇佣人工
items.summary_en: Microsoft reports that in some cases, running AI—tokens, agents, and infrastructure—costs more than employing people. This underscores the tricky economics behind AI-powered workflows and products, where cost discipline, model efficiency, and pricing matter just as much as accuracy. It explains why enterprises push for cheaper tokens, better caching, and smarter orchestration.
items.summary_zh: 微软在某些情形下称 AI 的运行成本（包括 token、代理与基础设施）高于雇佣人力的成本。这凸显了 AI 驱动工作流的经济学挑战——成本控制、模型效率与定价与准确性同等重要。因此企业倾向于追求更便宜的 token、更高效的缓存和更聪明的编排。

items.title_en: Sleep research led to a new sleep apnea drug
items.title_zh: 睡眠研究催生新型睡眠呼吸暂停药物
items.summary_en: Decades of sleep research pinpointed targets for sleep apnea therapies, leading to a novel drug that improves nighttime breathing. The translational path from basic sleep science to therapeutics demonstrates how understanding sleep physiology can yield tangible medical advances. If approved, the drug could add a new option for patients who struggle with current treatments.
items.summary_zh: 数十年的睡眠研究锁定了睡眠呼睡眠暂停治疗的新靶点，从而催生了一种改善夜间呼吸的新药。将基础睡眠科学转化为治疗手段，展示了对睡眠生理学的深入理解如何带来切实的医学进步。若获批，该药或为现有治疗无效的患者提供新的治疗选择。

items.title_en: Hindenburg’s Smoking Room
items.title_zh: 兴登堡号的吸烟室
items.summary_en: Revisiting the Hindenburg's smoking room shows how smoking aboard reflected its era's norms and safety limits for hydrogen airships. The piece uses this detail to illuminate design trade-offs and the broader context of the disaster.
items.summary_zh: 回顾兴登堡号上的吸烟室，揭示了当时社会对吸烟的态度以及氢气飞艇的安全挑战。文章以这一细节为切入点，阐释设计取舍及灾难发生的背景。

items.title_en: 'We mould trees to grow into the shape of chairs'
items.title_zh: 我们把树木培育成椅子形状
items.summary_en: The BBC feature explores designers growing trees into chair shapes, blending biology with furniture design for sustainable, living materials. It highlights how living processes can redefine manufacturing, aesthetics, and material sourcing.
items.summary_zh: 这篇 BBC 报道介绍设计师让树木按椅子形状成长，运用生物学实现可持续、有机的家具设计。它展现了活体材料如何重新定义制造、美学与材料来源。

items.title_en: Show HN: Number Gacha, a gacha game distilled to its essence
items.title_zh: Show HN：Number Gacha，一款被简化到本质的扭蛋游戏
items.summary_en: Showcases Number Gacha, a gacha game distilled to its essence with a focus on numeric mechanics. The project demonstrates how minimalistic design can still deliver engaging gamified behavior.
items.summary_zh: 展示了一款以数字为核心、极简设计的扭蛋游戏，强调用最小化的设计实现有趣的玩法。

items.title_en: Colorado Amended SB051 (Age Verification Bill) to Exclude Open Source Projects
items.title_zh: 科罗拉多州将 SB051（年龄验证法案）排除开源项目
items.summary_en: Colorado amended SB051 to exempt open-source projects from age-verification requirements, alleviating compliance burden for maintainer communities. The change highlights tensions between consumer protections and open-source workflows, and could influence future policy design around age checks.
items.summary_zh: 科罗拉多州对 SB051 进行了修订，将开源项目排除在年龄验证要求之外，减轻维护者社区的合规负担。此举凸显了消费者保护与开源工作流程之间的张力，可能影响未来关于年龄验证的政策设计。

items.title_en: CUDA Books
items.title_zh: CUDA 书籍合集
items.summary_en: A curated round-up of CUDA-focused books for developers, outlining topics from fundamentals to advanced GPU programming. It serves as a quick learning path for accelerating workloads on GPUs.
items.summary_zh: 收集整理了专注于 CUDA 的书籍，涵盖从入门到高级的 GPU 编程主题，为加速工作负载提供了快速学习路径。

items.title_en: Get your passwords out of Bitwarden while you still can
items.title_zh: 趁 Bitwarden 仍可用时，导出你的密码
items.summary_en: An alert urges users to export their vaults from Bitwarden amid potential changes, emphasizing the importance of having a backup plan and considering migration to alternative storage options to avoid lock-in.
items.summary_zh: 警示提醒用户在 Bitwarden 可能的变动来临前导出密码库，强调备份与迁移到其他存储方案的重要性，以避免数据被锁定。

items.title_en: US tech firms share Dutch regulator officials' names with Senate
items.title_zh: 美国科技公司向参议院披露荷兰监管机构官员姓名
items.summary_en: US tech firms provided the names of Dutch regulator officials to the Senate, highlighting cross-border transparency and lobbying dynamics. The move raises questions about privacy, influence, and how regulator contacts are tracked in oversight.
items.summary_zh: 美国科技公司向参议院提交荷兰监管机构官员的姓名，暴露了跨境透明度与游说格局。此举引发对隐私、影响力以及监管联系人追踪方式的讨论。

items.title_en: The Eternal Sloptember
items.title_zh: 永恒的 Sloptember
items.summary_en: The Eternal Sloptember centers on the enduring concept of Sloptember.
items.summary_zh: 《永恒的 Sloptember》围绕 Sloptember 的持续概念展开。

items.title_en: .NET (OK, C#) finally gets union types
items.title_zh: .NET（C#）引入联合类型
items.summary_en: .NET 11 preview 2 adds union types to C#, enabling sum types and more expressive data modeling. This brings functional-style patterns to C# and could simplify error handling and domain modeling. Expect changes to pattern matching and code that previously relied on discriminated unions.
items.summary_zh: .NET 11 预览版为 C# 引入联合类型，使表达变体和不同类型的值更为简洁，从而提升数据建模和错误处理的能力。这将把函数式风格的模式匹配带入 C#，并可能影响依赖判定的联合类型的代码。相关代码与库可能需要调整以利用新特性。

items.title_en: Constraint Decay: The Fragility of LLM Agents in Back End Code Generation
items.title_zh: 约束衰退：后端代码生成中 LLM 代理的脆弱性
items.summary_en: The paper argues that LLM-based agents degrade in reliability when performing backend code generation due to constraint drift, brittle tool integration, and context limits. It discusses implications for building robust AI copilots and practical engineering safeguards.
items.summary_zh: 论文指出，在后端代码生成任务中，基于 LLM 的代理因约束漂移、工具集成脆弱性和上下文容量限制而表现不稳。并讨论构建鲁棒 AI 助手以及落地工程保护的要点。

items.title_en: Not alive, but not dead: disembodied human brains used for drug testing
items.title_zh: 非活而未死：用于药物测试的离体人脑
items.summary_en: Researchers are using disembodied human brain tissue in drug-testing experiments, challenging the line between life and death. The approach could yield new data on how drugs affect brain tissue, but raises ethical concerns about consent and the moral status of the tissue.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员在药物测试中使用离体的人脑组织，这模糊了生死界线。此做法可能带来关于脑组织对药物反应的新数据，但也引发知情同意与脑组织道德地位的讨论。

items.title_en: Tracking Starbucks' 'widely recyclable' cups: none ended up at recycling
items.title_zh: 追踪星巴克‘广泛可回收’杯子：没有进入回收体系
