items.summary_en: An investigation tracking Starbucks' 'widely recyclable' cups finds none were recycled, highlighting a gap between green marketing and real-world recycling outcomes. The report suggests green claims may outpace waste management capabilities and calls for transparent reporting and stronger standards.
items.summary_zh: 对星巴克‘广泛可回收’杯子的调查发现，几乎没有杯子真的被回收。此现象揭示了绿色宣传与实际回收之间的差距，呼吁建立更强的回收体系并对企业可持续承诺进行透明披露。

items.title_en: Polypad
items.title_zh: Polypad：在线数学绘板
items.summary_en: Polypad is an online math sandbox that lets users manipulate tiles, shapes, and equations to explore geometry and algebra interactively. It supports collaborative learning and could serve as a versatile classroom or self-study tool.
items.summary_zh: Polypad 是一个在线数学沙盒工具，提供可拖拽的磁砖、几何形状和方程等，便于师生在浏览器中进行协作式、动手式的数学探索。它体现了教育科技在浏览器端提供直观学习体验的趋势。

items.title_en: Dumb ways for an open source project to die
items.title_zh: 让开源项目死去的愚蠢之道
items.summary_en: An essay outlining common missteps that doom open-source projects—opaque governance, dwindling maintainer energy, and misaligned incentives. It offers practical reminders for maintainers and communities to design sustainable processes and governance to avoid burnout and abandonment.
items.summary_zh: 文章列出导致开源项目夭折的常见误区，如治理不清、维护者热情衰退、激励错位等，并给维护者与社区提出可执行的可持续治理建议，帮助避免倦怠与放弃。

items.title_en: Linux security mailing list 'almost unmanageable'
items.title_zh: Linux 安全邮件列表几乎难以管理
items.summary_en: Linus Torvalds says AI-powered bug hunters have made the Linux security mailing list almost unmanageable due to volume and noise. The note highlights the tension between openness and signal quality in security discourse.
items.summary_zh: 托瓦尔兹表示 AI 驱动的漏洞猎人让 Linux 安全邮件列表几乎难以管理，原因是信息量大且噪声较多。这体现了开放性与信息质量之间的张力。

items.title_en: Jank now has its own custom IR
items.title_zh: Jank 现推出自定义中间表示（IR）
items.summary_en: Jank now ships its own custom IR, enabling more aggressive optimizations and easier backend targeting. This move signals a shift toward mature compiler infrastructure.
items.summary_zh: Jank 现推出自定义中间表示（IR），提升了代码优化的灵活性并简化后端目标对接。这一举措标志着编译器基础设施走向成熟。

items.title_en: Migrating from Go to Rust
items.title_zh: 从 Go 迁移到 Rust
items.summary_en: A practical migration guide helps teams decide when to port Go code to Rust, with stepwise strategies, interoperability patterns, and clear trade-offs. It emphasizes balancing safety and performance gains against cost and team readiness.
items.summary_zh: 迁移指南从评估时机、分步迁移模式、互操作性等角度，帮助团队将代码从 Go 迁移到 Rust。强调在性能与内存安全收益、成本以及团队准备之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Kindle loyalists scramble as Amazon turns page on old e-readers
items.title_zh: Kindle 忠实用户抢购，亚马逊停止对部分旧款电子书阅读器的支持
items.summary_en: Amazon is phasing out support for older Kindle devices, triggering a scramble among loyal customers who rely on legacy hardware. The move underscores how platform lifecycles influence device obsolescence, upgrade incentives, and the ongoing tension between infrastructure resilience and product segmentation.
items.summary_zh: 亚马逊结束对部分老款 Kindle 的支持，引发忠实用户的抢购与换机热潮。此举反映了平台生命周期对设备淘汰、升级激励以及对产品分段策略的影响。

items.title_en: Meta deletes popular 1M follower account after Kuwaiti request
items.title_zh: Meta 在科威特请求后删除了1M粉丝的热门账号
items.summary_en: Meta deleted a popular account with about a million followers following a Kuwaiti government request, illustrating platform compliance with state demands. The move spotlights censorship, geopolitics, and platform accountability in a global social web.
items.summary_zh: Meta 在科威特政府请求后删除了一个拥有约一百万粉丝的热门账号，凸显平台对政府要求的合规性。这一举动引发对全球社交网络中文章审查、地缘政治与平台问责的讨论。

items.title_en: How to convert between wealth and income tax
items.title_zh: 财富与所得税之间的转换方法
items.summary_en: Paul Graham's piece discusses the conceptual shift between wealth and income taxation, highlighting incentives and policy implications. It offers a framework for thinking about how wealth creation interacts with tax policy and personal planning.
items.summary_zh: 这篇保罗·格雷厄姆的文章探讨了财富税与所得税之间的关系及激励与政策含义，提供了理解财富创造与税制、个人规划之间关系的框架。

items.title_en: The Companies Cutting Headcount for AI Will Lose to the Ones Who Didn't
items.title_zh: 为 AI 裁员的公司将输给那些没有裁员的公司
items.summary_en: Firms cutting headcount to adopt AI risk losing long-term competitiveness, as AI alone won’t replace skilled work. Those who maintain or retrain staff while deploying AI tend to outperform. The piece cautions against using cost-cutting as a substitute for strategic AI adoption.
items.summary_zh: 为引入 AI 而裁员的企业可能在长期竞争力上处于不利地位，因为 AI 无法完全取代高技能工作。那些保留或培训员工并结合 AI 的公司往往表现更好。文章警示，单纯以裁员降成本不能替代对 AI 的战略性应用。

items.title_en: The FBI Wants 'Near Real-Time' Access to US License Plate Readers
items.title_zh: 联邦调查局希望实现对车牌识别系统的‘近实时’访问
items.summary_en: The FBI seeks near real-time access to license plate reader data to bolster investigations, raising civil liberty concerns about surveillance overreach. The debate centers on balancing security benefits with privacy protections.
items.summary_zh: FBI 希望获得对车牌识别系统的近实时访问以强化调查，挥之不去的监控自由担忧随之而来。讨论聚焦于在提升安全与保护隐私之间取得平衡。

items.title_en: Spanish court declines to fine NordVPN over LaLiga piracy blocking order
items.title_zh: 西班牙法院拒绝就 NordVPN 处以罚款
items.summary_en: A Spanish court refused to fine NordVPN for LaLiga piracy blocking orders, suggesting that the enforcement of blocking requests against VPNs remains legally nuanced. The decision affects how anti-piracy measures are applied to privacy-focused services and could influence future court rulings.
items.summary_zh: 西班牙法院裁定不对 NordVPN就LaLiga 阻止盗版的拦截令处以罚款，显示对 VPN 服务的取证与执行仍具法理上的复杂性。此判决或将影响将来对隐私保护服务的版权拦截措施及司法走向。

items.title_en: The IBM-ification of Google?
items.title_zh: 谷歌的 IBM 化？
items.summary_en: The piece argues that Google’s growth and complexity risk slipping into IBM-like bureaucratic inertia, examining organizational structure, decision bottlenecks, and the tension between speed and large-scale AI experimentation.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为谷歌的快速成长和日益复杂的组织结构可能陷入类似 IBM 的官僚化，探讨了组织架构、决策瓶颈以及高效运营与大规模 AI 实验之间的张力。

items.title_en: WriteUp: 16 Bytes of x86 that turn Matrix rain into sound
items.title_zh: 写作笔记：16 字节的 x86 将矩阵雨变成声音
items.summary_en: A write-up demonstrates how 16 bytes of x86 code can synthesize audible sound from the Matrix rain visualization, illustrating extreme code-golf techniques and low-level audio synthesis. The result highlights how tiny snippets can produce multimedia.
items.summary_zh: 这篇写作展示了用仅仅16字节的 x86 代码就能把矩阵雨可转成声音，体现了极简编码与多媒体合成的极限。对于低级编程与代码高球爱好者而言，这是一个有趣的演示，展示了紧凑代码如何实现音频合成。

items.title_en: Prolog Coding Horror
items.title_zh: Prolog 编程的恐惧
items.summary_en: Prolog has a reputation for a steep learning curve and quirky behavior that makes debugging a headache. This piece highlights Prolog's backtracking and logic-first mindset, arguing many developers find it a painful fit for real-world projects.
items.summary_zh: 本文直陈 Prolog 的学习曲线陡峭、行为怪异且回溯机制复杂，调试常常令人头疼。文章聚焦其逻辑驱动的工作方式，认为在实际项目中，许多开发者会因此感到深刻的“编码恐惧”。

items.title_en: Qian Xuesen: The missile genius America lost and China gained (2025)
items.title_zh: 钱学森：美国失去的导弹天才，中国获得的机会（2025）
items.summary_en: Qian Xuesen, the renowned missile scientist, left the United States and later steered China's rocket program. The piece revisits how his departure shaped China’s ballistic missile capabilities and the broader Cold War tech rivalry.
items.summary_zh: 钱学森被誉为中国导弹之父，因在美遭遇怀疑而返回祖国，随后主导中国的火箭与导弹计划。本文回顾他离美如何助推中国导弹技术崛起，以及对冷战科技对峙的影响。

items.title_en: Mercurial, 20 years and counting: how are we still alive and kicking? [video]
items.title_zh: Mercurial：二十年仍在坚挺
items.summary_en: Mercurial celebrates two decades of existence, highlighting its tooling philosophy, performance, and the ongoing debate with Git. The video likely surveys the community, use cases, and what keeps Mercurial relevant in modern workflows.
items.summary_zh: Mercurial 已运行二十年，展示其工具设计哲学、性能与在与 Git 的持续对比中的定位。视频回顾社区、典型场景，以及令 Mercurial 在现代工作流中仍具生命力的因素。

items.title_en: You can no longer Google the word 'disregard'
items.title_zh: 你现在无法在谷歌中搜索单词“disregard”
items.summary_en: A quirky update shows Google search behavior around the word 'disregard' behaving in an unexpected way, illustrating how search indexing and edge cases can alter even simple queries. It sparks reflection on search quality and the fragility of algorithmic results.
items.summary_zh: 关于单词“disregard”的搜索表现出现意外行为，揭示搜索索引在边缘情况下可能如何改变简单查询，值得反思搜索质量与算法结果的脆弱性。

items.title_en: London Mayor Blocks Palantir
items.title_zh: 伦敦市长因隐私担忧阻止 Palantir 合同
items.summary_en: London's mayor blocks a Palantir deal with the Met Police over privacy and civil liberties concerns. The decision highlights tensions between data-enabled policing and public accountability, potentially slowing adoption of external analytics.
items.summary_zh: 伦敦市长因隐私与公民自由担忧，阻止警察部队与 Palantir 的合作。此举凸显数据驱动治安与公民权利之间的紧张关系，或影响对外部分析平台的采用。

items.title_en: Greg Brockman interview [video]
items.title_zh: Greg Brockman 访谈（视频）
items.summary_en: Key takeaways from Greg Brockman on building AI at scale, safety, governance, and the future of intelligence deployment, with reflections on engineering culture and long-term policy.
items.summary_zh: Greg Brockman 就大规模 AI 构建、安全、治理及未来 AI 部署等议题给出要点，分享了工程文化与长期政策的看法。

items.title_en: Ask an Astronaut: 333 hours of Q&A footage with astronauts
items.title_zh: 向宇航员提问：333 小时的问答影像
items.summary_en: 333 hours of Q&A footage with astronauts provides a rare, first-hand window into life in space, training, and decision-making under pressure. The archive serves as a rich resource for educators, researchers, and AI-trained simulations of human spaceflight.
items.summary_zh: 包含333小时的宇航员问答影像，揭示太空生活、训练和任务决策的第一手视角。该影像集对教育工作者、研究人员以及用于人机系统仿真的AI训练都具备宝贵价值。

items.title_en: C++26 Shipped a SIMD Library Nobody Asked For
items.title_zh: C++26 发布了一款无人要求的 SIMD 库
items.summary_en: C++26 ships a SIMD library that many developers didn't request, drawing debate over practicality, API design, and portability. The piece argues this addition risks adding complexity without delivering clear performance wins.
items.summary_zh: C++26 发布了一款并非广泛需求的 SIMD 库，引发关于实用性、API 设计与跨平台性的讨论。文章认为此功能的引入可能带来额外的复杂性，而未必带来显著的性能提升。

items.title_en: OpenAI Is Preparing to File for an IPO Soon
items.title_zh: OpenAI 将很快申请首次公开募股
items.summary_en: OpenAI is preparing to file for an IPO, signaling a maturation of its hybrid-profit model and a shift toward public markets. The move could reshape AI funding dynamics and governance considerations for investors and policymakers.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 正在筹备上市，标志其混合盈利模式走向公开市场。此举可能改变 AI 投资格局与治理机制，值得投资者与决策者关注。

items.title_en: FBI director's Based Apparel site has been spotted hosting a 'ClickFix' attack
items.title_zh: Based Apparel 网站被发现承载 ClickFix 攻击
items.summary_en: Security researchers spotted a 'ClickFix' attack used by visitors to trick them into installing malware on Based Apparel’s site, exploiting social-engineering-like prompts. It illustrates how attackers abuse trusted brands or pages to deliver infections, even when security-conscious sites are involved.
items.summary_zh: 安全研究人员发现 Based Apparel 网站成为 ClickFix 攻击的载体，利用访客中的社交工程式提示诱导安装恶意软件。这一事件说明攻击者会利用受信任的品牌或页面来传播感染，即便目标网站具备一定的安全防护。

items.title_en: DeepSeek to Make Permanent 75% Discount on Flagship AI Model
items.title_zh: DeepSeek 将旗舰 AI 模型永久降价75%
items.summary_en: DeepSeek plans to lock in a permanent 75% discount on its flagship AI model, a move that could reshape competitive dynamics and accessibility. The strategy signals a push to broaden adoption among startups and researchers.
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek 将旗舰 AI 模型永久降价 75%，此举可能重塑竞争格局与可及性。此策略表明其在推动初创公司和研究者广泛采用方面的野心。

items.title_en: Chewing gum restores dad's taste and smell years after Covid
items.title_zh: 口香糖在新冠后多年恢复爸爸的味觉与嗅觉
items.summary_en: A case report describes a dad regaining taste and smell years after COVID-19 after using chewing gum, suggesting potential insights into long-term sensory recovery. While anecdotal, it adds to the conversation about non-pharmacological aids for post-COVID symptoms.
items.summary_zh: 报道或案例指出口香糖在新冠后多年帮助父亲恢复味觉和嗅觉，为感官康复提供新的线索，尽管仍需更多研究证据。

items.title_en: -​-dangerously-skip-reading-code
items.title_zh: 危险地跳过阅读代码
items.summary_en: A candid take on the hazards of skipping code reading—bugs, security flaws, and fragile designs creep in when teams skim rather than read. The post advocates deliberate reading, thorough reviews, and supportive tooling to catch subtle issues.
items.summary_zh: 直言不讳地指出跳过仔细阅读代码的风险：草率浏览、潜在的安全漏洞和脆弱的设计容易被忽视。文章主张认真阅读、全面评审，并借助工具提升代码理解与质量控制。

items.title_en: Hyperpolyglot Lisp: Common Lisp, Racket, Clojure, Emacs Lisp
items.title_zh: 超多 Lisp 方言：Common Lisp、Racket、Clojure 与 Emacs Lisp
items.summary_en: A survey of the main Lisp dialects—Common Lisp, Racket, Clojure, and Emacs Lisp—highlighting where each shines and where they clash. It covers language design, tooling, ecosystems, and practical tips for choosing or bridging between dialects.
items.summary_zh: 文章梳理了常用的 Lisp 方言：Common Lisp、Racket、Clojure 与 Emacs Lisp，比较各自的优势与局限。它讨论了语言设计、开发工具和生态系统，并给出在项目中选择或实现跨方言互操作的实用思路。

items.title_en: Shutterstock to pay $35M over hard-to-cancel subscriptions
items.title_zh: Shutterstock 因难以取消的订阅被罚款 3500 万美元
items.summary_en: Shutterstock has agreed to pay $35 million to settle FTC allegations that its subscription practices made cancellations difficult and misled consumers. The case highlights regulatory scrutiny of online subscriptions and the need for clear, user-friendly cancellation flows.
items.summary_zh: Shutterstock 同意支付 3500 万美元以解决 FTC 对其难以取消订阅做法的指控。此案凸显对在线订阅的监管关注以及提升取消流程透明度与易用性的必要性。

items.title_en: Photo GIMP – A Patch for GIMP 3 for Photoshop Users
items.title_zh: Photo GIMP：面向 Photoshop 用户的 GIMP 3 补丁
items.summary_en: A patch project aims to bring GIMP 3 closer to Photoshop in UI and features, helping Photoshop users migrate with familiar workflows and color management.
items.summary_zh: 该补丁项目致力于让 GIMP 3 在界面、工作流和颜色管理等方面更接近 Photoshop，方便 Photoshop 用户迁移并保持熟悉的工作方式。

items.title_en: Childhood Computing
items.title_zh: 童年计算
items.summary_en: Childhood Computing examines how early exposure to computing shapes later skills and interests. It offers anecdotes and practical ideas for educators and parents to cultivate curiosity, literacy, and responsible tech use from a young age.
items.summary_zh: 《童年计算》探讨了童年早期接触计算对日后技能与兴趣的影响。文章通过趣闻与可落地的教育建议，帮助教师和家长培养孩子的好奇心、计算素养以及对科技的负责任使用。

items.title_en: Hengefinder: Finding when the sun aligns with your street
items.title_zh: Hengefinder：寻找太阳与街道对齐的时刻
items.summary_en: Hengefinder is described as a tool to determine when the Sun aligns with a street's orientation, enabling urban planning, photography, and historical astronomy studies. It helps enthusiasts predict solar events that create henge-like light—useful for architecture and culture projects.
items.summary_zh: 介绍一款工具，旨在找出太阳与街道走向对齐时刻，便于城市规划、摄影与考古天文研究。它帮助爱好者预测会出现日光对齐的日子，便于相关项目。

items.title_en: Google I/O
items.title_zh: Google I/O 开发者大会
items.summary_en: Google I/O typically spotlights new Android and AI developments, along with developer tools and cloud innovations. Expect announcements around product roadmaps, platform updates, and demonstrations of AI-powered features that shape Google's consumer and enterprise strategy.
items.summary_zh: Google I/O 通常聚焦 Android 与 AI 的新进展、开发者工具以及云端创新。预计将宣布产品路线图、平台更新，并展示推动 Google 面向消费者与企业策略的 AI 功能。

items.title_en: Nobody understands the point of hybrid cars [video]
items.title_zh: 没有人理解混合动力汽车的意义 [视频]
items.summary_en: A video argues that hybrid cars' purpose is unclear, prompting discussion about their ongoing role amid EVs and policy. It catalyzes debate on whether hybrids complement or compete with full electrification.
items.summary_zh: 视频认为混合动力汽车的意义被人误解，引发关于其在电动车时代与政策环境中的角色的讨论。

items.title_en: Don't just paste the AI at me
items.title_zh: 别只是把 AI 的结果塞给我
items.summary_en: It argues for treating AI as a component in a broader workflow, not a drop-in paste of outputs. The piece advocates clear prompts, guardrails, and measurable outcomes to avoid sloppy adoption and hallucination.
items.summary_zh: 该文主张将 AI 视为工作流中的一个组成部分，而非直接塞给用户的输出。强调需有清晰的提示、治理边界和可衡量的结果，避免草率采用与输出幻觉等问题。

items.title_en: Show HN: Rmux – A programmable terminal multiplexer with a Playwright-style SDK
items.title_zh: Show HN：Rmux——具备 Playwright 风格 SDK 的可编程终端多路复用器
items.summary_en: Rmux is a programmable terminal multiplexer powered by a Playwright-style SDK, enabling automated terminal sessions and CLI workflows. It exposes scriptable control over panes, sessions, and commands, unlocking reproducible end-to-end testing and automation for developers.
items.summary_zh: Rmux 是一个可编程的终端多路复用器，具备 Playwright 风格的 SDK，使你能够自动化终端会话和 CLI 工作流。它提供对分屏、会话和命令的脚本化控制，帮助开发与测试人员实现可重复的端到端场景。

items.title_en: Gemini 3.5 Flash: frontier intelligence with action
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.5 Flash：具行动能力的前沿智能
items.summary_en: Gemini 3.5 Flash combines fast reasoning with actionable outputs, enabling the model to perform tasks and act on information in real time. This accelerates automation and could empower developers to build more proactive, context-aware assistants across apps and services.
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.5 Flash 将快速推理与可执行输出结合起来，能够在实时情境中执行任务并行动。此能力有望加速自动化，并帮助开发者打造更主动、具情境感知的助手。

items.title_en: Slumber a TUI HTTP Client
items.title_zh: Slumber：一个 TUI HTTP 客户端
items.summary_en: Slumber is a terminal-based HTTP client with a text UI designed for quick API exploration. It combines keyboard-driven navigation, editable requests, and formatted responses to streamline API testing in a lightweight, locally contained tool. The project aims to make everyday API work feel more like interacting with a native app.
items.summary_zh: Slumber 提供一个基于终端的 HTTP 客户端，配备文本界面，便于快速探索 API。它支持键盘操作、请求编辑和格式化输出，让 API 测试更像在本地应用中进行，从而提升工作效率。

items.title_en: New York to tax luxury second homes in NYC
items.title_zh: 纽约市将对豪华第二套住宅征税
items.summary_en: New York proposes taxing luxury second homes in NYC, broadening the tax base beyond primary residences. The move could influence real estate demand, residency choices, and city revenue.
items.summary_zh: 纽约市拟对豪华第二套住宅征税，扩大税基至非主要居所。此举可能影响房地产需求、居住选择与城市财政收入。

items.title_en: Haskell Foundation 2026 Update
items.title_zh: Haskell 基金会 2026 更新
items.summary_en: The Haskell Foundation's 2026 update outlines governance, funding, and ecosystem-building efforts for the Haskell community. It signals continued investment in tooling, education, and ecosystem sustainability.
items.summary_zh: Haskell 基金会发布 2026 更新，概述治理、资金及生态系统建设的工作，显示对工具链、教育与社区可持续性的持续投入。

items.title_en: Making deep learning go brrrr from first principles (2022)
items.title_zh: 从第一性原理让深度学习跑起来
items.summary_en: From first principles, this piece builds intuition for deep learning by focusing on core ideas like differentiable graphs, backpropagation, and optimization. It shows how simple concepts, engineered well, can power substantial performance gains without hype.
items.summary_zh: 从第一性原理出发，聚焦可微分计算图、反向传播与优化等核心思想，帮助读者建立深度学习直觉。展示如何用简单原理通过仔细设计实现显著性能提升，而非靠炒作。

items.title_en: Spotify will start reserving concert tickets for fans
items.title_zh: Spotify 将为粉丝保留演唱会门票
items.summary_en: Spotify will start reserving concert tickets for superfans, a feature that could improve fan loyalty and reduce scalping by giving verified fans early access. The move signals the platform’s shift from streaming-only to event monetization, potentially reshaping artist-ticket distribution and fan engagement. Expect more integrations between streaming profiles and live shows.
items.summary_zh: Spotify 将为超级粉丝保留演唱会门票，这一举措有助于提升粉丝忠诚度并通过优先权减少黄牛。此举标志着平台从纯粁流媒体向活动票务与艺人生态的扩张，可能改变艺人票务分配与粉丝互动方式。未来可能看到流媒体资料与现场演出的更多整合。

items.title_en: Archaeologists find Egyptian mummy buried with the 'Iliad'
items.title_zh: 考古学家发现带有《伊利亚特》页的埃及木乃伊
items.summary_en: Archaeologists discovered a mummy with pages from the Iliad, illustrating cross-cultural exchange and the value placed on classical texts in antiquity. The find sheds light on funerary practices and the broader exchange of texts in antiquity.
items.summary_zh: 考古学家在一具埃及木乃伊中发现《伊利亚特》的文本残页，揭示了古代社会中文本的跨文化传播与价值观。此发现为理解葬仪习俗及古代文本的流通提供新线索。

items.title_en: Rubish: A Unix shell written in pure Ruby
items.title_zh: Rubish：一个用纯 Ruby 编写的 Unix shell
items.summary_en: Rubish is a Unix shell implemented entirely in Ruby, illustrating how a high-level language can power a shell prototype and the trade-offs involved. It serves as a learning project for exploring shell design and Ruby metaprogramming.
items.summary_zh: Rubish 是一个完全用 Ruby 实现的 Unix shell，展示了用高级语言实现一个 shell 原型的可行性及其中的权衡。此项目适合作为探索 shell 设计与 Ruby 元编程的学习案例。

items.title_en: I’m writing again
items.title_zh: 我又开始写作
items.summary_en: The author announces a return to writing, outlining a renewed focus on thoughtful tech commentary and personal essays. The piece signals a recommencement of publishing momentum and invites reader engagement.
items.summary_zh: 作者宣布重回写作，计划重点输出关于科技与个人观察的深思短文。文中透露将重新进入连载节奏，并欢迎读者参与互动。

items.title_en: 1024000^2 Blocks, 2B2T Minecraft Server World Download Project, and Discoveries
items.title_zh: 1024000^2 块、2B2T 世界下载计划及发现
items.summary_en: A project attempting to download the entire 2B2T world with a staggering 1.0e12 blocks reveals the scale of Minecraft's procedurally generated terrain and the challenges of data capture. The effort yields insights into storage, chunking, and network transfer, along with surprising finds from the sprawling map. It underscores the tensions between archival ambition and practical limits.
items.summary_zh: 一次企图以约 1 万亿方块规模下载 2B2T 世界的工程暴露了 Minecraft 程序化生成地形的规模与数据捕获的挑战。该工作带来了存储、分块和传输方面的见解，并在庞大地图中发现了有趣的结构与遗迹。它凸显了档案化野心与现实极限之间的张力。

items.title_en: sp.h: Fixing C by giving it a high quality, ultra portable standard library
items.title_zh: sp.h：通过提供高质量、超便携的 C 语言标准库来修复问题
items.summary_en: sp.h proposes a high-quality, ultra-portable C standard library, addressing portability gaps and simplifying cross-platform development. The project offers a pragmatic approach to building reliable C software across systems.
items.summary_zh: sp.h 提出一个高质量、超便携的 C 标准库，解决跨平台移植性难题，帮助简化跨系统的软件开发。

items.title_en: Usborne 1980s Computer Books
items.title_zh: Usborne 1980 年代的计算机书籍
items.summary_en: Usborne's 1980s computer and coding books helped a generation learn BASIC and early computing through approachable projects. The collection highlights how beginner-friendly guides shaped digital literacy and left a lasting cultural footprint.
items.summary_zh: Usborne 的 1980 年代计算机与编码书籍通过易学的项目引导一代人学习 BASIC 和早期计算机知识。该系列展示了面向初学者的讲解如何塑造数字素养，并留下持久的文化印记。

items.title_en: Kv4p HT – A homebrew 1W radio (VHF or UHF) that plugs into an Android phone
items.title_zh: Kv4p HT – 可以插入 Android 手机的自制 1W 无线电（VHF/UHF）
items.summary_en: Kv4p HT is a DIY handheld transceiver delivering about 1 watt, designed to plug into an Android phone. The project showcases a compact, open hardware approach to mobile amateur radio and raises considerations about licensing, shielding, and usability.
items.summary_zh: Kv4p HT 是一个自制的手持发射机，功率约为 1 瓦，设计为可直接连接 Android 手机使用。该项目体现了面向移动业余无线电的紧凑开放硬件思路，同时引发对许可证、屏蔽与易用性等问题的思考。

items.title_en: VoIP brings back old-fashioned pay phones to rural Vermont (2025)
items.title_zh: VoIP 技术在佛蒙特州农村重新部署电话亭（2025）
items.summary_en: A pilot uses VoIP-based payphones to fill gaps in rural Vermont where mobile coverage is spotty. Internet-connected kiosks offer emergency calling and everyday use, reviving a classic public amenity with modern networking.
items.summary_zh: VoIP 技术在佛蒙特州农村重新部署电话亭，弥补移动覆盖薄弱带来的通信盲区。借助互联网连接，这些亭子既能提供紧急呼叫，也能完成日常通话，展示用现代网络改造旧有基础设施的尝试。

items.title_en: Strange crystals found inside wreckage from the first nuclear bomb test
items.title_zh: 第一颗核弹试验残骸中的晶体
items.summary_en: Scientists report crystals found inside wreckage from the Trinity test, offering new clues about the materials and processes involved in the early nuclear weapons experiment. The findings illuminate historical physics and materials science.
items.summary_zh: 科学家在第一颗核弹试验（Trinity）残骸中发现晶体，提供关于早期核武器试验材料与工艺的新线索。

items.title_en: Regex Chess: A 2-ply minimax chess engine in 84,688 regular expressions
items.title_zh: 正则棋：84,688 个正则表达式实现的两步极小极大棋引擎
items.summary_en: Describes a playful experiment encoding a chess engine's decisions entirely in regular expressions, achieving a 2-ply minimax with a massive base of rules. It highlights creativity at the edge of practicality and invites reflection on representation versus performance.
items.summary_zh: 描述一个用大量正则表达式实现棋局决策的玩趣实验，凭借庞大的规则库实现了两步极小极大搜索。此举凸显了创意在实用性边界的边缘，以及对表示法与性能权衡的思考。

items.title_en: Learnings from 100K lines of Rust with AI (2025)
items.title_zh: AI 助手下的 Rust 代码：100K 行的经验教训
items.summary_en: Lessons from writing 100k lines of Rust with AI assistance, covering design choices, testing strategies, and maintainability when tooling and code generation play a larger role. It reflects on how AI copilots shape Rust development.
items.summary_zh: 总结在 AI 助力下编写 10 万行 Rust 代码的经验教训，涵盖设计选择、测试策略与可维护性，并讨论 AI 助手如何影响 Rust 开发节奏与代码质量。

items.title_en: Peter Salus has died
items.title_zh: 彼得·纽曼去世
items.summary_en: Obituary for Peter Neumann, a renowned computer scientist known for security research and contributions to information safety and policy.
items.summary_zh: 纪念在计算机安全与信息风险研究领域具影响力的彼得·纽曼，他的离去被视为对安全科学和社区的一大损失。

items.title_en: Alberta to hold referendum on whether to remain in Canada
items.title_zh: 艾伯塔省将就是否留在加拿大举行公投
items.summary_en: Alberta plans a referendum on whether to remain in Canada, centering questions of provincial autonomy and resource governance. The outcome could influence federal-provincial dynamics and energy policy discussions.
items.summary_zh: 艾伯塔省计划就是否留在加拿大举行公投，聚焦省级自治与资源治理等议题。结果可能影响联邦与省级关系以及能源政策的讨论。

items.title_en: Who wins and who loses in prediction markets? Evidence from Polymarket
items.title_zh: 预测市场中谁胜谁负？来自 Polymarket 的实证研究
items.summary_en: Evidence from Polymarket shows prediction markets can efficiently aggregate information, with winners typically better-informed traders and those who manage risk well; however, the market also faces liquidity and manipulation concerns. The research informs both the financial viability of prediction markets and regulatory considerations.
items.summary_zh: 来自 Polymarket 的证据表明预测市场能够有效聚合信息，获利者通常是信息掌握更充分且风险管理能力更强的交易者；但市场也存在流动性不足和操纵等问题。这项研究为预测市场的经济可行性及监管考量提供了洞见。

items.title_en: Multiple commencement speakers booed for AI comments during graduation speeches
items.title_zh: 多位毕业典礼演讲者因AI言论被观众嘘声
items.summary_en: Several commencement speakers faced boos after bringing up AI, highlighting a divide over AI's role in society and education. The reactions illustrate how the AI conversation can polarize audiences, even in celebratory settings, as institutions weigh automation's implications.
items.summary_zh: 多名毕业典礼发言人在提及人工智能后遭遇观众嘘声，凸显社会与教育领域对 AI 角色的分歧。此类反应显示人工智能话题已成为公众关注的焦点，即使在庆祝场合也会引发两极化讨论。

items.title_en: Toxic chemical leak at a manufacturing facility in Orange County
items.title_zh: 奥兰治郡一家制造厂发生有毒化学物质泄漏
items.summary_en: A toxic chemical leak at a manufacturing facility in Orange County prompted evacuations and health risk assessments for nearby residents. Authorities are investigating the source and containment, highlighting industrial safety and regulatory oversight.
items.summary_zh: 奥兰治郡一家制造厂发生有毒化学物质泄漏，促使周边居民疏散并进行健康风险评估。相关部门正调查泄漏源头并加强防护和监管，凸显工业安全的重要性。

items.title_en: A Forth-inspired language for writing websites
items.title_zh: 受 Forth 启发的用于编写网站的语言
items.summary_en: A Forth-inspired language for writing websites offers a stack-based, minimalist approach to building pages, aiming at rapid prototyping and a different programming mindset for web developers. The piece contrasts it with HTML/JS ecosystems and explores potential benefits.
items.summary_zh: 一款受 Forth 启发的用于编写网站的语言，采用栈式、极简语法来搭建网页，旨在实现快速原型开发与网页开发者的不同编程思维。文章对比了它与 HTML/JS 生态，并探讨潜在好处。

items.title_en: Infomaniak transitions to a foundation model to protect user data privacy
items.title_zh: Infomaniak 转向基础模型以保护用户数据隐私
items.summary_en: Infomaniak is adopting a foundation model approach to protect user data privacy. By housing the model stack in its sovereign cloud and tightening data handling controls, the company aims to minimize data exposure and improve user control over AI processing. The move highlights a growing trend of privacy-conscious providers considering foundation models as a way to balance AI usefulness with data governance.
items.summary_zh: Infomaniak 正在采用基础模型策略以提升数据隐私保护。通过将模型堆栈置于自有 souverign 云并强化数据处理控制，该公司旨在降低数据暴露风险并提高用户对 AI 处理的掌控感。这一举措反映出隐私导向的云服务商开始将基础模型用于在确保数据治理的同时发挥 AI 作用。

items.title_en: EU weighs restricting use of US cloud platforms to process government data
items.title_zh: 欧盟考虑限制将美国云平台用于政府数据 processing
items.summary_en: EU policymakers weigh restricting US cloud platforms for processing government data due to sovereignty and security concerns. The move could spur local cloud alternatives and reshape global cloud dynamics.
items.summary_zh: 欧盟在主权与安全担忧驱动下，权衡限制美国云平台处理政府数据。此举可能推动本地云方案的兴起并重塑全球云格局。

items.title_en: Models.dev: open-source database of AI model specs, pricing, and capabilities
items.title_zh: Models.dev：开源的 AI 模型规格、定价与能力数据库
items.summary_en: Models.dev is an open-source database cataloging AI model specs, pricing, and capabilities, helping developers compare offerings and plan deployments. By aggregating model details, it lowers discovery friction and could influence how startups choose AI services.
items.summary_zh: Models.dev 是一个开源数据库，汇总 AI 模型的规格、定价与能力，帮助开发者比较不同产品并制定部署计划。集中整理信息有助于降低发现成本，可能影响初创企业对 AI 服务的选择。

items.title_en: Improving C# Memory Safety
items.title_zh: 提升 C# 内存安全性
items.summary_en: Microsoft discusses strides in memory safety for C#, highlighting language features (nullable references, spans, or memory-safe patterns) and runtime improvements. The piece explains how these changes reduce common bugs while preserving performance.
items.summary_zh: 微软阐述了提升 C# 内存安全性的进展，聚焦可空引用、Span 等安全特性与运行时改进，说明这些变化如何降低常见错误并保持性能。

items.title_en: Australia Four-Day Work Week Study Data Shows Boosted Productivity
items.title_zh: 澳大利亚四天工作周研究数据：生产力提升
items.summary_en: Australian trials show that a four-day workweek can boost productivity without sacrificing output, while workers report lower stress and higher morale. The data adds to a growing body of evidence that shorter work weeks can be a viable option for knowledge workers.
items.summary_zh: 澳大利亚的四天工作周试点数据显示，在压缩工作日的同时，生产力保持提升，员工压力和满意度也有所改善。数据进一步支持缩短工时对知识工作者的可行性及潜在政策影响。

items.title_en: The death of the brick and mortar toy store
items.title_zh: 实体玩具店的衰落
items.summary_en: Brick-and-mortar toy stores are closing at growing rates as online shopping and digital entertainment siphon foot traffic and margins. The piece analyzes how inventory strategies, margins, and local economic factors are reshaping physical toy retail, with implications for creators and small businesses.
items.summary_zh: 实体玩具店因线上购物和数字娱乐分流客流与利润而迅速关闭。文章分析了存货策略、利润率和地方经济因素如何改变线下玩具零售格局，并对创作者与小企业的前景产生影响。

items.title_en: Enough with the AI FOMO, go slow-mo, says Domo CDO
items.title_zh: Domo CDO：别再追逐 AI 的错失恐惧，要慢慢来
items.summary_en: Domo's Chief Data Officer urges a slower, more deliberate approach to AI adoption, warning against AI hype and stressing data quality, governance, and measurable ROI.
items.summary_zh: Domo 首席数据官呼吁放慢对 AI 的追逐，抵制盲目炒作，强调数据质量、治理和可衡量投资回报的重要性。

items.title_en: SBCL: the ultimate assembly code breadboard (2014)
items.title_zh: SBCL：汇编代码的面包板（2014）
items.summary_en: The piece positions SBCL as a practical playground for low-level experimentation inside a high-level Lisp system. It argues that Lisp macros and SBCL's runtime make it easy to prototype and benchmark tiny assembly ideas without sacrificing safety. It's a reminder of how language ecosystems can accelerate systems tinkering.
items.summary_zh: 本文把 SBCL 当作在高阶 Lisp 环境中进行底层实验的实用面包板，强调 Lisp 宏与 SBCL 运行时能在不牺牲安全性的前提下快速原型化和基准测试汇编思路。这也提醒读者，语言生态可以加速系统层面的试验。

items.title_en: Build Adafruit projects right from Firefox
items.title_zh: Firefox 让 Adafruit 项目直接在浏览器构建
items.summary_en: Firefox now enables building and interacting with Adafruit hardware projects directly from the browser, leveraging in-browser USB/Serial capabilities. This reduces setup friction for makers and demonstrates growing hardware-tethered experiences in the browser.
items.summary_zh: Firefox 现在支持直接在浏览器中构建并与 Adafruit 硬件项目互动，利用浏览器内的 USB/串口能力。为开发者和创客降低了上手难度，展现出浏览器在硬件协作方面日益成熟的趋势。

items.title_en: ICE Awards $25M Iris-Scanning Contract to Bi2 Technologies
items.title_zh: ICE 授予 Bi2 Technologies 2500 万美元虹膜识别合同
items.summary_en: The U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement awards Bi2 Technologies a $25 million contract to deploy iris-scanning systems, raising privacy and civil-liberties questions about biometric surveillance.
items.summary_zh: ICE 授予 Bi2 Technologies 一份价值2500万美元的虹膜识别合同，引发对生物识别监控的隐私与公民自由问题的讨论。

items.title_en: What Do Gödel's Incompleteness Theorems Mean?
items.title_zh: 哥德尔不完备性定理到底意味着什么？
items.summary_en: Gödel's incompleteness theorems are explained in accessible terms, clarifying what they mean for formal systems and the limits of proving mathematical truths within a fixed set of rules.
items.summary_zh: 对哥德尔不完备性定理进行通俗解释，阐明它们对形式系统的局限以及在固定公理体系内证明数学真理的边界。文中讨论了对计算机科学、人工智能与证明本质的影响。

items.title_en: High-Entropy Alloy
items.title_zh: 高熵合金
items.summary_en: High-entropy alloys promise superior strength and resilience by mixing many elements; the item likely discusses recent breakthroughs or applications in aerospace, defense, or manufacturing.
items.summary_zh: 高熵合金通过混合多种元素实现更高强度和耐久性，近年来在航天、国防等领域出现新进展与应用。

items.title_en: Why is almost everyone right-handed? A new study connects it to bipedalism
items.title_zh: 几乎所有人都用右手？新研究把这一现象与直立行走的演化联系起来
items.summary_en: A new study links right-handedness to the evolution of bipedalism, suggesting brain lateralization and motor control co-evolved with walking on two legs. The finding adds a biological lens to everyday human behavior.
items.summary_zh: 一项新研究将右利手现象与直立行走的演化联系起来，暗示大脑半球化与运动控制在双足行走中共同演化。该发现为日常行为提供了新的生物学视角。

items.title_en: What Is Date:Italy?
items.title_zh: Date:Italy 是什么意思？
items.summary_en: Date:Italy delves into the meaning and implications of the label Date:Italy, prompting readers to rethink how locale shapes data and storytelling.
items.summary_zh: Date:Italy 探讨标签背后的含义及其在数据叙事中的影响，促使读者重新思考地域如何塑造信息。

items.title_en: Learn Harness Engineering
items.title_zh: 学习 Harness 工程
items.summary_en: Learn Harness Engineering is a new educational resource from Walking Labs, introducing Harness engineering concepts and practical tutorials. It provides a structured pathway for developers to explore the Harness framework.
items.summary_zh: Walking Labs 推出名为《学习 Harness 工程》的新教育资源，系统介绍 Harness 的工程概念与实用教程。它为开发者提供了探索该框架的清晰学习路径。

items.title_en: Show HN: ShadowCat – file transfer through QR Codes in a Browser
items.title_zh: ShadowCat：浏览器内通过二维码传输文件
items.summary_en: ShadowCat enables file transfers via QR codes inside a browser, offering a lightweight, privacy-preserving transfer method without server dependencies. This approach showcases how browser-first tools can enable quick P2P sharing with low setup friction.
items.summary_zh: ShadowCat 在浏览器中通过二维码实现文件传输，提供一种轻量且注重隐私的传输方式，无需服务器依赖。此类浏览器优先的工具展示了在低门槛下实现点对点共享的可行性。

items.title_en: No more JetBrains products for me
items.title_zh: 我再也不用 JetBrains 的产品
items.summary_en: The author explains leaving JetBrains tools due to licensing, performance, or policy concerns, detailing impact on workflow and suggesting alternative tools and adjustments.
items.summary_zh: 作者解释放弃 JetBrains 工具的原因，涉及许可证、性能和政策等因素。文章还讨论对工作流程的影响，并提出可替代工具和工作流调整的建议。

items.title_en: Magical Realism: “Northern Exposure” 25 Years Later (2015)
items.title_zh: 《Northern Exposure》二十五年回顾：魔幻现实主义
items.summary_en: A nostalgia piece on Northern Exposure highlights its magical realism, quirky characters, and lasting impact two and a half decades after its debut. The essay argues the show's tonal blend still resonates in the streaming era.
items.summary_zh: 回顾性文章探讨《Northern Exposure》如何将魔幻现实主义与小镇叙事相融合，以及其在首播二十多年后的持续影响。作者认为在今日的流媒体时代，这部剧的风格与人物塑造仍具共鸣。

items.title_en: I keep bouncing off the Scheme language
items.title_zh: 我一直被 Scheme 语言卡住
items.summary_en: The author chronicles ongoing friction with Scheme, a minimalist Lisp dialect, and reflects on its clean semantics versus a steep learning curve. The piece offers practical takeaways about when its simplicity pays off and when it can hinder progress in real-world projects.
items.summary_zh: 作者记录了自己在学习 Scheme 时不断遇到的困难， Scheme 的极简 Lisp 语法与清晰语义与陡峭的学习曲线形成对比。文章给出在实际项目中何时因其简洁而受益、何时又因学习成本而成为拖累的洞察。

items.title_en: Why is Inkwell stuck in review
items.title_zh: 为什么 Inkwell 一直卡在审核阶段
items.summary_en: Inkwell remains stuck in review, highlighting bottlenecks in platform vetting processes that slow down developers. The post argues for more transparency and timelier decisions to help independent developers get tools to users.
items.summary_zh: Inkwell 审核迟迟未下线，暴露出平台审查流程的瓶颈，延缓开发者的工具上线。作者呼吁提高透明度和更高效的决策，以帮助独立开发者更快将工具提供给用户。

items.title_en: DHS Quits Granting Green Cards–Almost
items.title_zh: 国土安全部几乎停止发放绿卡
items.summary_en: The DHS has effectively halted new green card grants, signaling a shift in immigration processing and potential backlogs for applicants and employers. The move raises concerns about workforce planning, family reunification timelines, and policy enforcement.
items.summary_zh: 国土安全部已实质性地暂停新绿卡发放，标志着移民处理流程的重大转变及申请人与雇主可能面临的积压。此举引发对人力规划、家庭团聚的等待期以及政策执行的担忧。

items.title_en: CBP Directive 3340-049B: Border Search of Electronic Devices
items.title_zh: CBP 指令 3340-049B：边境对电子设备的搜查
items.summary_en: CBP's directive clarifies border search authority for electronic devices, outlining procedures, privacy considerations, and data handling. The guidance informs travelers and developers about what can be inspected and how data is stored or used.
items.summary_zh: CBP 的指令明确了边境对电子设备搜查的权限与程序，涵盖隐私考量与数据处理。为旅行者和开发者提供了对可检查内容以及数据存储与使用方式的指引。

items.title_en: 'AI washing': firms are scrambling to rebrand themselves as tech-focused
items.title_zh: AI 洗白：企业争相包装成以技术为核心的公司
items.summary_en: Many firms are rushing to rebrand as technology-focused AI players, often without meaningful AI capabilities, a trend critics call AI washing. The piece surveys examples and explains why hype can outpace real product and talent investments, risking credibility and investor trust.
items.summary_zh: 许多公司急于把自己包装成以 AI 为核心的科技企业，往往缺乏实质性的 AI 能力，这种趋势被称为 AI 洗白。文中梳理了若干案例，解释了炒作如何赶超实际产品与人才投入，侵蚀可信度和投资者信任。

items.title_en: Your Most Improbable Life
items.title_zh: 你最不可思议的人生
items.summary_en: A provocative piece exploring improbable life paths and the choices that shape a tech career. It invites readers to reflect on non-linear journeys and serendipity in pursuing ambitious goals.
items.summary_zh: 这篇短文探讨了在科技职业中那些看似不可能的生活路径与选择所带来的影响。它促使读者思考非线性的人生轨迹与实现雄心的机遇。

items.title_en: Electrobun 2.0 will be decoupled from Bun due to the Rust rewrite
items.title_zh: Electrobun 2.0 将因重写为 Rust 而与 Bun 解耦
items.summary_en: Electrobun 2.0 is being decoupled from Bun as a Rust rewrite advances, signaling modular architecture and performance goals. The shift matters for developers depending on Bun for fast tooling and for understanding how language runtimes evolve.
items.summary_zh: 由于用 Rust 重写，Electrobun 2.0 将与 Bun 分离，朝向更模块化、性能导向的架构。此变动对依赖 Bun 的开发者及运行时演进具有重要意义。

items.title_en: Multi-Stream LLMs: new paper on parallelizing/separating prompts, thinking, I/O
items.title_zh: 多流大模型：关于并行化/分离提示、思考与 I/O 的新论文
items.summary_en: A new paper on Multi-Stream LLMs proposes parallelizing prompts, internal thinking, and I/O to improve throughput and reasoning. The idea is to run multiple streams of computation in tandem to reduce latency and better manage resources, with potential implications for scalable AI systems and tool-using agents.
items.summary_zh: 一篇关于多流大模型的新论文提出将提示、推理过程和输入输出并行化，以提升吞吐量与推理效率。通过并行计算流来降低延迟、优化资源管理，对可扩展 AI 系统与具工具代理的应用具有潜在影响。

items.title_en: Mastering Dyalog APL
items.title_zh: 精通 Dyalog APL
items.summary_en: Dyalog APL remains one of the most expressive array languages; this resource pack promises practical guidance—from idioms to performance tricks—to help you write concise, fast APL code. It emphasizes vectorized thinking and how to leverage Dyalog’s extensions for real-world data tasks.
items.summary_zh: Dyalog APL 是最具表达力的数组语言之一，这份资源集合提供实用指南—from 常用习惯用法到性能技巧，帮助你写出简洁且高效的 APL 代码。文章强调向量化思维，以及如何利用 Dyalog 的扩展应对实际数据任务。

items.title_en: Hanoi’s humble beer glass and the memory of a nation
items.title_zh: 河内的朴素啤酒杯与民族记忆
items.summary_en: A longform piece uses Hanoi's humble beer glass as a lens to explore Vietnamese memory and national identity, showing how everyday objects can embody collective history.
items.summary_zh: 一篇长文以河内朴素的啤酒杯为线索，探讨越南的记忆与国家认同。日常物件如何成为集体历史的载体以及在社会记忆中的作用。

items.title_en: Alexander Grothendieck Revolutionized 20th-Century Mathematics
items.title_zh: 亚历山大·格罗滕迪克如何革新了20世纪数学
items.summary_en: Grothendieck profoundly reshaped 20th-century mathematics by advancing categories, toposes, and structural thinking. The piece traces how his ideas redirected the field toward abstraction and unifying frameworks that influenced algebraic geometry and beyond.
items.summary_zh: 格罗滕迪克通过推进范畴、层概念以及结构化思维，深刻改变了20世纪的数学。文章梳理了他如何把数学推向高度抽象的统一框架，深远影响了代数几何及其他领域。

items.title_en: Mycorrhizal Fungi, Nature's Key to Plant Survival and Success
items.title_zh: 菌根真菌：植物生存与繁盛的自然之钥
items.summary_en: Mycorrhizal fungi form networks that extend plant root systems, aiding nutrient and water uptake and enabling communication between plants. Understanding this symbiosis has practical implications for sustainable agriculture and ecosystem resilience.
items.summary_zh: 菌根真菌通过形成网络扩展植物根系，帮助营养和水分吸收，并促进同群植物之间的信号传递。理解这一共生关系对可持续农业和生态系统韧性具有现实意义。

items.title_en: The Fil-C Optimized Calling Convention
items.title_zh: Fil-C 的优化调用约定
items.summary_en: The Fil-C calling convention outlines practical optimizations for function calls, including argument-passing rules, register usage, and ABI stability. The spec aims to reduce call overhead and boost performance for Fil-C tooling and applications in its ecosystem.
items.summary_zh: Fil-C 调用约定概述了函数调用的实际优化，包括参数传递规则、寄存器使用与 ABI 稳定性。该规范旨在降低调用开销、提升 Fil-C 工具链和应用的性能，并促进生态内的互操作性。

items.title_en: Sales and Dungeons: Thermal printer TTRPG utility
items.title_zh: Sales and Dungeons：热敏打印机在桌面角色扮演游戏中的实用工具
items.summary_en: A neat TTRPG utility that uses a thermal printer to print game content on demand, lowering setup costs for tabletop sessions. The project demonstrates approachable hardware-software integration and a playful take on RPG tooling.
items.summary_zh: 一款有趣的桌面角色扮演游戏（TTRPG）工具，利用热敏打印机按需输出游戏内容，降低了设置成本。该项目展示了软硬件集成的可操作性与对 RPG 场景的创新应用。

items.title_en: Wi-Wi is wireless time sync at 1 nanosecond
items.title_zh: Wi-Wi：无线时间同步约1纳秒
items.summary_en: Wi-Wi demonstrates wireless time synchronization with sub-nanosecond precision, offering a cable-free path to synchronizing distributed systems. If broadly deployable, it could simplify clock alignment for data centers, edge networks, and IoT, though practical adoption hinges on hardware and interference considerations.
items.summary_zh: Wi-Wi 展示了无线时间同步的亚纳秒级精度，为分布式系统提供无缆对时方案。若广泛应用，可能简化数据中心、边缘网络与物联网的时钟对齐，但实际落地取决于硬件支持与干扰等因素。

items.title_en: Most Americans don't trust AI – or the people in charge of it (2025)
items.title_zh: 大多数美国人不信任 AI 及掌控者（2025）
items.summary_en: Pew/Gallup data show broad American distrust of AI and the people shaping it in 2025. The sentiment spans technology, governance, and corporate motives, posing legitimacy challenges for AI initiatives.
items.summary_zh: 皮尤/盖洛普数据表明，2025 年多数美国人对 AI 及其掌控者缺乏信任，涉及科技、治理与企业动机，给 AI 项目带来公信力挑战。

items.title_en: The quadratic sandwich
items.title_zh: 二次函数三明治
items.summary_en: A playful look at how a quadratic function can be analyzed with a 'sandwich' approach, illustrating tight bounds and intuition for limits.
items.summary_zh: 以二次函数为对象，用夹心式思路直观展示界限与极限的关系，带来有趣的直觉理解。

items.title_en: The C64 Dead Test Font
items.title_zh: C64 的 Dead Test 字体
items.summary_en: A faithful recreation of the Commodore 64's iconic Dead Test font, enabling pixel-perfect retro typography in modern projects. The bitmap glyphs reproduce the C64 look for use in emulators, demos, and educational materials without relying on legacy ROMs. This underscores ongoing interest in authentic vintage typography for authenticity in demos and tutorials.
items.summary_zh: 忠实再现了 Commodore 64 的 Dead Test 位图字形，使现代项目能够实现像素级的复古字体效果。此字体便于在仿真器、演示和教学材料中再现 C64 的风格，而无需依赖旧 ROM。显示出在演示与教育场景中对复古排版真实性的持续需求。

items.title_en: Voice AI Systems Are Vulnerable to Hidden Audio Attacks
items.title_zh: 语音 AI 系统易受隐藏音频攻击
items.summary_en: Researchers show that voice AI systems can be manipulated by hidden audio attacks—commands played at inaudible frequencies. The vulnerability matters for consumer devices and enterprise systems alike, highlighting a need for robust microphone filtering, anomaly detection, and adversarial audio defenses.
items.summary_zh: 研究人员表明，语音 AI 系统可能被听不见的隐藏音频攻击所利用，发出不可听见的指令即可执行。此漏洞对消费级设备和企业系统都具有现实意义，强调需要加强麦克风滤波、异常检测以及对抗性音频防护。

items.title_en: My I3-Emacs Integration
items.title_zh: 我的 I3 与 Emacs 集成
items.summary_en: A personal writeup detailing how the author integrates the i3 window manager with Emacs to streamline workflows. It covers keybindings, window management ergonomics, and tips for making Emacs feel native within a tiling environment.
items.summary_zh: 作者分享在 i3 窗口管理器和 Emacs 之间的集成方案，描述如何通过自定义快捷键和排布实现无缝工作流，使 Emacs 在平铺窗口环境中更高效。

items.title_en: A fundamental principle of aeronautical engineering has been overturned
items.title_zh: 航空工程的一个基本原则被推翻
items.summary_en: A new result overturns a long-held principle in aeronautical engineering, prompting reevaluation of design assumptions and simulation practices. The finding could affect aircraft stability analysis and safety margins across the industry.
items.summary_zh: 研究推翻了航空工程中的一个长期基本原理，促使人们重新审视设计假设和仿真方法。这一发现可能影响飞行器稳定性分析和安全裕度，波及整个行业。

items.title_en: Ruby for Good
items.title_zh: Ruby for Good：用 Ruby 做善事
items.summary_en: Ruby for Good mobilizes Ruby developers to volunteer on charitable tech projects, combining open-source collaboration with social impact. Participants gain practical experience while nonprofits receive improvements to software and operations.
items.summary_zh: Ruby for Good 号召 Ruby 开发者参与慈善项目的技术工作，将开源协作与社会影响结合起来。参与者获得实战经验，非营利组织获得软件和运营上的改进。

items.title_en: Ask HN: Shouldn't Google need to give a public statement about Railway incident?
items.title_zh: Ask HN：谷歌是否应就 Railway 事件公开发表声明？
items.summary_en: Ask HN questions whether Google should issue a public statement about the Railway incident, touching on accountability, transparency, and the role of tech giants in crisis communication.
items.summary_zh: 讨论谷歌是否应就 Railway 事件公开发表声明，涉及问责、透明度及科技巨头在危机沟通中的角色。

items.title_en: Sharla Boehm, the programmer whose code underpins the Internet
items.title_zh: Sharla Boehm：支撑互联网的程序员
items.summary_en: Sharla Boehm is highlighted as a foundational figure behind the Internet’s codebase, underscoring how overlooked programmers helped build the global network. The profile emphasizes recognizing diverse contributions in tech history.
items.summary_zh: 文章聚焦 Sharla Boehm 对互联网基础架构的贡献，揭示了被低估的程序员如何推动全球互联的发展。该专题强调在科技史中应当承认多元贡献者的重要性。

items.title_en: Growing Neural Cellular Automata
items.title_zh: 成长型神经元细胞自动机
items.summary_en: Growing Neural Cellular Automata extends neural networks to control the growth of cellular automata, enabling shapes to emerge from a single cell and even exhibit self-healing. The work demonstrates robust, emergent design principles with potential implications for biology-inspired computation and scalable hardware-like systems.
items.summary_zh: 成长型神经元细胞自动机让神经网络控制细胞自动机的生长，能从单个细胞生成形状，甚至具备自我修复能力。该工作展示了可自发演化的鲁棒设计原理，对生物启发计算和可扩展的硬件式系统具有潜在影响。

items.title_en: Intro to TLA+ for the LLM Era: Prompt Your Way to Victory
items.title_zh: 面向 LLM 时代的 TLA+ 入门：通过提示取胜
items.summary_en: The piece shows how formal methods like TLA+ can be used with prompts in the LLM era to model and verify correctness properties, helping build more reliable AI-enabled systems.
items.summary_zh: 文章介绍在 LLM 时代如何把 TLA+ 等形式化方法与提示相结合，用以建模和验证正确性属性，从而提升 AI 系统的可靠性。

items.title_en: Judson's Last Ride
items.title_zh: Judson 的最后之旅
items.summary_en: A political op-ed examining the final phase of Judson's career and what it signals for the current political landscape.
items.summary_zh: 一篇政治评论，探讨 Judson 公职生涯的最后阶段及其对当前政治格局的影响。

items.title_en: Formal Verification Gates for AI Coding Loops
items.title_zh: AI 编码循环的形式化验证
items.summary_en: The post advocates applying formal verification techniques to AI coding loops to ensure safety and correctness in iterative AI reasoning. It suggests structural approaches to bound behavior and improve reliability in long-running agent systems.
items.summary_zh: 文中主张把形式化验证方法应用于 AI 编码循环，以保障迭代式 AI 推理的安全性与正确性。提出通过结构性方法约束行为、提升长期代理系统的可靠性。

items.title_en: New features in GCC 16: Improved error messages and SARIF output
items.title_zh: GCC 16 的新特性：改进的错误信息与 SARIF 输出
items.summary_en: GCC 16 ships with improved error messages and SARIF output, easing debugging and enabling better static analysis workflows. This helps developers pinpoint issues faster and integrates more smoothly with analysis tools.
items.summary_zh: GCC 16 带来改进的错误信息和 SARIF 输出，降低调试成本并提升静态分析工具的集成体验。这有助于开发者更快定位问题，并便于与现有分析工具对接。

items.title_en: PHP's Oddities
items.title_zh: PHP 的怪癖与奇特之处
items.summary_en: PHP's oddities survey pokes at language quirks—from loose typing to surprising edge cases—revealing why PHP remains a mixed bag for developers. The piece serves as a practical reminder to test edge conditions and to leverage modern PHP features for robust apps.
items.summary_zh: 探讨 PHP 的一些怪癖和边缘情况，揭示语言的优缺点及其对开发实践的影响。文章也提醒开发者在现代 PHP 环境下注意边界条件。

items.title_en: Copy Fail, Dirty Frag, and Fragnesia kernel vulnerabilities
items.title_zh: Gentoo 新闻：Copy-Fail、Dirty Frag 与 Fragnesia 内核漏洞
items.summary_en: Gentoo Linux warns of multiple kernel vulnerabilities nicknamed Copy-Fail, Dirty Frag, and Fragnesia. Users should apply patches and upgrade affected kernels to mitigate potential exploits.
items.summary_zh: Gentoo Linux 发布关于 Copy-Fail、Dirty Frag 与 Fragnesia 等多项内核漏洞的通告。用户应尽快应用补丁并升级受影响的内核，以降低被利用的风险。

items.title_en: 1940 Air Terminal Museum Begins Liquidation
items.title_zh: 1940 空港航站博物馆启动清算
items.summary_en: The 1940 Air Terminal Museum begins liquidation of its assets, including simulators and exhibits. The process underscores the fragility of preserving vintage aerospace tech and the challenge of sustaining small museums amid funding pressures.
items.summary_zh: 博物馆启动资产清算，涉及模拟器与展品等。此举凸显保留老旧航空科技藏品的困难，以及小型博物馆在资金压力下的生存挑战。

items.title_en: Don't Roll Your Own
items.title_zh: 不要自己造轮子：不要自己实现加密算法
items.summary_en: Don't Roll Your Own argues against implementing cryptography from scratch; instead, rely on vetted libraries and standards to avoid subtle flaws and security risks. It provides guidelines for when to use established crypto primitives and how to securely compose them.
items.summary_zh: 不要自己造轮子：不要从零实现加密算法；应使用经过验证的库和标准，以避免细微缺陷和安全风险。文中给出在何时应选用成熟的密码学原语以及如何安全地组合它们的实用建议。

items.title_en: Fender escalates legal campaign against S-style guitars
items.title_zh: Fender 对 S-型吉他制造商扩大法律行动
items.summary_en: Fender expands legal action against S-style guitar makers, possibly targeting LSL Instruments over trademark or design rights. The move underscores ongoing IP battles in guitar hardware and the market for licensed Fender designs, with implications for small manufacturers and customization communities.
items.summary_zh: Fender 对 S 型吉他制造商扩大法律行动，可能涉及商标或设计权等问题。这凸显吉他硬件领域持续的知识产权之战，并对小厂商与定制社区产生潜在影响。

items.title_en: Defeating Git Rigour Fatigue with Jujutsu
items.title_zh: 以柔术化解 Git 的严格流程疲劳
items.summary_en: A pragmatic take argues against rigid Git workflows that burn out teams, offering lightweight, jujutsu-inspired practices to reduce cognitive load. Expect tips like smaller pull requests, incremental changes, and flexible branching to maintain momentum.
items.summary_zh: 文章认为对 Git 的过度严格流程会让团队疲惫，主张用“柔术式”的简化方法降低认知负荷。给出可操作的建议，如缩短提交范围、分支策略更灵活、逐步变更以保持开发势头。

items.title_en: Node.js 26.0.0 (Now with Temporal)
items.title_zh: Node.js 26.0.0：现内置 Temporal
items.summary_en: Node.js 26.0.0 adds Temporal, a modern date/time API, to the runtime, promising safer handling of calendars and timestamps. The release touches on developer ergonomics and potential shifts in how time is modeled in JavaScript apps.
items.summary_zh: Node.js 26.0.0 将 Temporal 引入运行时，提供更现代的日期时间 API，提升日历和时间戳处理的安全性。此举对开发者的体验与 JavaScript 应用中的时间建模产生潜在影响。

items.title_en: Blood Pumping Mechanism of the Hoof (2020)
items.title_zh: 蹄部血液泵送机制
items.summary_en: Research into the hoof shows a unique mechanism that helps pump blood back toward the body during locomotion, relying on tendons and the hoof's geometry. Understanding this helps veterinarians and breeders optimize hoof health and manage circulation-related issues in horses. It also informs bioinspired design of soft robotics.
items.summary_zh: 对马蹄的研究揭示了一种独特的血液回流机制，依靠肌腱和蹄部几何形状在运动中推动血液回至身体。这些发现有助于兽医与繁育者优化蹄部健康、管理循环相关问题，并为软体机器人等生物启发设计提供灵感。

items.title_en: The foundations of a provably secure operating system (PSOS) (1979) [pdf]
items.title_zh: 可证明安全操作系统（PSOS）的奠基
items.summary_en: A 1979 paper outlines a framework for an operating system whose security properties can be proven mathematically, addressing access control, isolation, and trusted computing base. It foreshadows modern formal methods and formal verification approaches used in systems like seL4 and other provably secure designs, highlighting enduring challenges in proving security properties in real-world OS design.
items.summary_zh: 1979年的这篇基础性论文提出一种可通过形式化推理来证明安全性的操作系统设计框架，聚焦访问控制、隔离性与受信计算基。它预示了现代形式化方法和操作系统安全证明的方向，并揭示在现实系统中实现可证明安全性所面临的难题。

items.title_en: Anyone on the Internet Can Ring Your Doorbell
items.title_zh: 互联网任何人都能按响你的门铃
items.summary_en: Internet-connected doorbells can be reached remotely if misconfigured, creating privacy and security risks.
items.summary_zh: 联网门铃若配置不当，可能被任意人远程触发，带来隐私与安全隐患。文中指出暴露面、认证薄弱，以及改进补丁和访问控制的必要性。

items.title_en: Converting an Integer to a Decimal String in Under Two Nanoseconds
items.title_zh: 在不到两纳秒内将整数转换为十进制字符串
items.summary_en: Describes an approach to render integers as decimal strings in under two nanoseconds on modern hardware, using a combination of branchless arithmetic and precomputed tables. The result highlights the edge of micro-optimizations in serialization, with implications for high-throughput logging and performance-critical systems.
items.summary_zh: 介绍在现代硬件上将整数转换为十进制字符串的极限方法，时间不到两纳秒，结合分支极小化的运算与预计算表。该成果凸显序列化微优化的边界，对高吞吐日志和性能敏感的系统具有启示意义。

items.title_en: z386: An Open-Source 80386 Built Around Original Microcode
items.title_zh: z386：基于原始微指令的开源80386实现
items.summary_en: z386 is an open-source recreation of the 80386 CPU built around authentic microcode, offering an educational glimpse into early x86 internals and a bridge between vintage hardware and modern tooling. The project tackles challenges of emulating legacy microcode and provides insight for hardware tinkering.
items.summary_zh: 开源重现的80386 CPU 项目 z386 基于原始微代码，提供了学习早期 x86 内部结构的机会。该项目在复现旧微代码方面面临挑战，并为硬件爱好者提供实践案例。

items.title_en: Recreate famous water profiles using supermarket bottled water
items.title_zh: 用超市瓶装水再现著名水质轮廓
items.summary_en: Shows how to approximate famous mineral water profiles by mixing supermarket bottled waters, a playful dive into water chemistry and taste impact. It demonstrates practical steps for tweaking water composition for experiments, brewing, or tasting sessions.
items.summary_zh: 这个有趣的项目演示了如何通过混合超市瓶装水来再现知名矿泉水的矿物质配置，直观展示水质对口味的影响，并给出实际操作的水质调配方法，适合品鉴和实验。

items.title_en: Reverse engineering circuitry in a Spacelab computer from 1980
items.title_zh: 对1980年Spacelab计算机电路的反向工程
items.summary_en: A deep dive into dissecting a vintage Spacelab computer's circuitry from 1980, outlining the reverse-engineering approach and notable findings about its hardware and architecture.
items.summary_zh: 对1980年Spacelab计算机电路的反向工程，概述了分析方法和硬件架构的关键发现。文中指出解读旧电路图的挑战，以及这项工作对早期航天计算的启示。

items.title_en: Silk: Open-source cooperative fiber scheduler
items.title_zh: Silk：开源的协作式纤程调度器
items.summary_en: Silk is an open-source cooperative scheduler designed to efficiently manage many lightweight tasks by yielding control explicitly. It enables high throughput with low overhead, fitting into data-processing stacks like ClickHouse. It’s a notable alternative to preemptive kernels for certain workloads.
items.summary_zh: Silk 是一个开源的协作式调度器，通过显式让出控制来高效管理大量轻量任务。它在低开销下实现高吞吐，适用于数据处理堆栈（如 ClickHouse），是对特定工作负载的有力替代方案。

items.title_en: Agora-1: The Multi-Agent World Model
items.title_zh: Agora-1：多智能体世界模型
items.summary_en: Agora-1 introduces a world model tailored for multi-agent environments, enabling agents to reason, coordinate, and plan within a shared model of the world. This work advances scalable, end-to-end reasoning for complex multi-agent tasks and aids research into emergent collaboration.
items.summary_zh: Agora-1 面向多智能体场景推出了一个世界模型，使智能体能够在共用的世界表示中进行推理、协调和规划。该工作推动对复杂多智能体任务的端到端推理能力，并有助于研究协作与涌现行为。

items.title_en: Mounting git commits as folders with NFS (2023)
items.title_zh: 通过 NFS 将 Git 提交挂载为文件夹
items.summary_en: Mounting Git commits as folders via NFS lets you browse repository history as if each commit were a distinct directory. It simplifies quick visual inspection of tree states across machines but may incur performance and metadata pitfalls. Useful for exploration, less for production workflows.
items.summary_zh: 通过 NFS 将 Git 提交挂载为文件夹，使你可以把每个提交当作独立目录来浏览提交树的状态。便于跨设备快速查看历史分支，但可能带来性能和元数据方面的问题，适合探索用途而非正式生产工作流。

items.title_en: Starship's Twelfth Flight Test
items.title_zh: 星舰第十二次飞行测试
items.summary_en: SpaceX's Starship undergoes its 12th flight test, pushing the vehicle through a rigorous, iterative test program. The milestone helps validate guidance, propulsion, and airframe integration as SpaceX marches toward orbital capability and ambitious lunar/Mars missions. Each test sharpens risk assessment and schedule for future flights.
items.summary_zh: SpaceX 的星舰正在进行第十二次飞行测试，推动车辆进入更严格的迭代测试阶段。此次里程碑有助于验证制导、推进和机体集成，为实现轨道发射能力以及月球/火星任务的目标提供反馈。每次测试都在为未来飞行的风险评估和时间表提供更清晰的依据。

items.title_en: A blueprint for formal verification of Apple corecrypto
items.title_zh: 苹果 CoreCrypto 的形式化验证蓝图
items.summary_en: Apple outlines a blueprint for formally verifying CoreCrypto, signaling a shift toward mathematically proven security for critical cryptographic code. The plan could influence how cryptographic libraries are developed and audited across the industry.
items.summary_zh: 苹果提出对 CoreCrypto 进行形式化验证的蓝图，标志着对关键密码实现进行严格数学证明的安全方向。此举可能影响业界在加密库开发与审核方面的做法。

items.title_en: Perceptual Image Codec: What Matters in Practical Learned Image Compression
items.title_zh: 感知图像编解码：实用学习型图像压缩中的要点
items.summary_en: This overview distills what actually matters in practical learned image compression: perceptual quality, rate-distortion trade-offs, training data, and deployment robustness. It argues for metrics and architectures that maintain perceptual fidelity under real-world constraints.
items.summary_zh: 本文提炼了实用的学习型图像压缩的关键要点：感知质量、码率-失真权衡、训练数据与落地稳健性。作者主张在实际约束下，选择能维持感知保真度的指标与架构。

items.title_en: Trials on veterans suggest ibogaine could provide a new treatment for PTSD
items.title_zh: 退伍军人研究表明 ibogaine 可能为 PTSD 提供新治疗方法
items.summary_en: Early trials suggest ibogaine could offer a new treatment for PTSD in veterans, possibly via neuroplasticity mechanisms. More research is needed to establish safety, dosing, and long-term outcomes.
items.summary_zh: 在退伍军人中的早期试验表明 ibogaine 可能为 PTSD 提供新疗法，或通过促进神经可塑性实现缓解。仍需进一步研究以确定安全性、剂量和长期效果。

items.title_en: Reviving old scanners with an in-browser Linux VM bridged to WebUSB over USB/IP
items.title_zh: 通过浏览器内的 Linux 虚拟机、并通过 WebUSB/USB/IP 桥接，重启了旧扫描仪并实现对硬件的无驱动访问
items.summary_en: A project resurrects old scanners by running a Linux VM in the browser, bridged via WebUSB and USB/IP, enabling hardware access without native drivers. It showcases browser-powered hardware experimentation and retro-fit ideas.
items.summary_zh: 该项目通过在浏览器中运行 Linux 虚拟机、并通过 WebUSB/USB/IP 桥接，重启了旧扫描仪并实现对硬件的无驱动访问。此举展示了浏览器驱动的硬件实验与复古兼容的思路。

items.title_en: Colonization of Venus
items.title_zh: 金星殖民
items.summary_en: An overview of historical and speculative approaches to colonizing Venus, outlining environmental and technological hurdles and what it would take to establish settlements.
items.summary_zh: 对金星殖民的历史与设想进行了综述，概述了环境与技术方面的挑战，以及实现定居点需要的条件。

items.title_en: Loopmaster – Livecoding Music IDE
items.title_zh: loopmaster：实时编码音乐集成开发环境
items.summary_en: Introduces loopmaster, a livecoding-focused music IDE for real-time coding of music. It emphasizes code-driven sequencing, live DSP, and an interactive workflow that lets musicians experiment with sounds as they write.
items.summary_zh: 介绍 loopmaster，一款面向实时音乐编程的 Live Coding 集成开发环境。强调通过代码驱动的序列化、实时 DSP 与交互式工作流，帮助音乐家在编写代码时即时试验声音。

items.title_en: The History of ThinkPad: From IBM’s Bento Box to Lenovo’s AI Workstations
items.title_zh: ThinkPad 的历史：从 IBM 的 Bento Box 到 Lenovo 的 AI 工作站
items.summary_en: A retrospective traces ThinkPad's journey from IBM's era and its iconic 'Bento Box' design to Lenovo's modern shift toward AI-accelerated workstations.
items.summary_zh: 本文回顾 ThinkPad 的发展史：从 IBM 时代的标志性设计到联想在 AI 时代的工作站定位的转变。通过设计与定位的变迁，揭示了企业移动性与硬件设计文化的演进。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Superset (YC P26) – IDE for the agents era
items.title_zh: Launch HN：Superset（YC P26）——面向代理时代的 IDE
items.summary_en: Superset positions itself as an IDE for the agents era, focusing on composing, debugging, and orchestrating AI agents and tool use. It reflects a broader shift toward automation-first developer workflows and tools that help manage multi-agent collaboration across tasks.
items.summary_zh: Superset 定位为“代理时代”的集成开发环境，聚焦编排、调试与协同AI代理及工具的使用。反映了向自动化优先的开发工作流转变，以及帮助管理多代理在不同任务中的协作。

items.title_en: CODA: Rewriting Transformer Blocks as GEMM-Epilogue Programs
items.title_zh: CODA：将 Transformer 块改写为 GEMM-Epilogue 程序
items.summary_en: CODA presents a method to map transformer blocks into sequences of GEMM-epilogue programs, enabling closer use of optimized GEMM backends and better memory locality. This approach aims to boost throughput on modern accelerators by restructuring core neural-net operations without changing model topology. It highlights how rethinking operators can unlock efficiency gains at the compiler and hardware interface.
items.summary_zh: CODA 提出一种将 Transformer 的计算映射为 GEMM-Epilogue 序列的方法，从而更充分地利用优化的 GEMM 后端并提升内存局部性。这一思路通过重构核心神经网络运算，以在不改变模型结构的前提下提升在现代加速器上的吞吐量，体现了在编译器与硬件接口层重新设计运算的潜在收益。

items.title_en: The first British person in space
items.title_zh: 英国首位太空人背后的惊人故事
items.summary_en: Helen Sharman became the UK's first astronaut after a televised competition and a Cold War-era collaboration with the Soviet space program. Her unlikely path, driven by public science education and serendipity, underscored how non-traditional routes can open access to space.
items.summary_zh: 赫伦·夏尔曼通过一场公开的电视竞赛和 Cold War 时期的苏联太空计划合作成为英国首位太空人。她的非同寻常之路依赖公众科普与偶然机遇，凸显了非传统路径也能打开通往太空的大门。

items.title_en: Why is Google Maps back to showing old satellite images of Altadena?
items.title_zh: 谷歌地图为何重新显示 Altadena 的旧卫星影像
items.summary_en: Observers noted Google Maps reverting to older satellite imagery for Altadena, prompting questions about data sources, licensing, and update cadence. The article explains how imagery updates can lag or temporarily revert due to data sourcing decisions, storage considerations, or rights constraints.
items.summary_zh: 观察者发现谷歌地图在 Altadena 显示的是旧卫星影像，引发对数据源、许可与更新节奏的关注。报道指出卫星影像更新可能因数据来源、存取许可或存储成本等原因出现滞后或短暂回退。

items.title_en: OpenAI to confidentially file for IPO as soon as Friday
items.title_zh: OpenAI 计划最早本周五秘密提交IPO申请
items.summary_en: OpenAI plans a confidential IPO filing as early as Friday, a high-profile move into public markets that would invite scrutiny of its revenue model and long-term profitability. The move could reshape expectations around AI lab funding and growth paths.
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 计划最早本周五秘密提交IPO申请，这将标志其在公开市场的高曝光度，并引发对其收入模式与长期盈利能力的关注。此举可能重塑人们对AI实验室融资与增长路径的预期。

items.title_en: Lisp in Web-Based Applications (2001)
items.title_zh: 网页应用中的 Lisp（2001）
items.summary_en: A retrospective look at using Lisp in web apps around 2001, arguing Lisp’s expressiveness and macro system could outperform traditional web stacks in some scenarios, while practical barriers limited adoption. Provides historical context for language debates in early web development.
items.summary_zh: 回顾性论文回顾了 2001 年左右在网页应用中使用 Lisp 的情况，认为 Lisp 的表达力和宏系统在某些场景下可能优于传统网页栈，但现实障碍限制了广泛采用，为早期语言选择的讨论提供了历史视角。

items.title_en: Chess invariants
items.title_zh: 棋局中的不变量
items.summary_en: Chess invariants examine stable properties of positions across games, offering insights into endgames and strategic reasoning that remain constant under moves. These invariants can inform puzzle design and AI evaluation of position quality.
items.summary_zh: 棋局不变量聚焦于跨局对局中保持不变的稳定性质，为残局与策略推理提供稳定基线。这些不变量可应用于棋局谜题设计与AI对局评估中的位置质量判断。

items.title_en: Launch HN: Runtime (YC P26) – Sandboxed coding agents for everyone on a team
items.title_zh: Launch HN: Runtime（YC P26）——为团队中的每个人提供沙盒化编码代理
items.summary_en: Launch HN introduces Runtime, a YC P26 company building sandboxed coding agents for teams. The idea is to let safe, restricted AI agents run in isolated sandboxes to assist coding without risking the broader system. Early-stage, promising for improving team collaboration if governance and security are well-handled.
items.summary_zh: Launch HN 推出 Runtime，YC 第26轮创业公司，面向团队提供沙盒化编码代理。该思路让经受严格隔离的 AI 助手在沙盒中协助编程，降低对整体系统的风险。处于初期阶段，若治理与安全得当，或提升团队协作效率。

items.title_en: FatGid: FreeBSD 14.x kernel local privilege escalation
items.title_zh: FatGid：FreeBSD 14.x 内核本地权限提升漏洞披露
items.summary_en: FatGid identifies a local privilege escalation in the FreeBSD 14.x kernel. The disclosure details a vulnerability that could allow unprivileged users to gain elevated privileges on affected systems, with advisories and patches likely on the horizon. It underscores ongoing kernel security research in BSD ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: FatGid 指出 FreeBSD 14.x 内核中的本地权限提升漏洞。漏洞可能让未授权用户获得提升权限，相关公告和修补程序预计将随之发布，凸显了 BSD 生态系统中持续的内核安全研究。

items.title_en: How diamonds are made
items.title_zh: Diamonds Are Made
items.summary_en: A geology-focused explainer on natural diamond formation—from deep-earth processes to high-pressure crystallization—linking to industrial applications and synthetic diamond tech.
items.summary_zh: 从深地过程到高压结晶，解释天然钻石的形成机制，并与工业应用及合成钻石技术相关联。

items.title_en: Show HN: I made a tactical map-based WWII submarine simulator (public beta)
items.title_zh: Show HN：我做了一个基于战术地图的二战潜艇模拟器（公开测试版）
items.summary_en: Public beta for a tactical map-based WWII submarine simulator, inviting players to plan and execute missions on a detailed map. The project demonstrates how accessible tools can support complex strategy simulations and crowdsource feedback early.
items.summary_zh: 公开测试版的战术地图为基础的二战潜艇模拟器，玩家可以在详细地图上规划并执行潜艇任务。这个项目展示了用易于使用的工具实现复杂策略模拟并在早期阶段收集反馈的可行性。

items.title_en: U.S. Cybersecurity Agency Leaves Its Digital Keys Out in Public on GitHub
items.title_zh: 美国网络安全与基础设施安全局在 GitHub 上公开数字密钥
items.summary_en: A U.S. cybersecurity agency exposed sensitive credentials on GitHub, highlighting secret management and supply-chain risk, and underscoring the need for swift rotation and governance.
items.summary_zh: 美国网络安全与基础设施安全局在 GitHub 上公开敏感凭据，暴露秘密管理和供应链风险，强调需要快速轮换密钥并加强治理。

items.title_en: Thinking in an array language (2022)
items.title_zh: 用阵列语言思考（2022）
items.summary_en: This 2022 write-up dives into array-oriented programming concepts, illustrating how working with multi-dimensional arrays and vectorized operations changes problem-solving approach and performance. It’s a practical primer for data-heavy workloads.
items.summary_zh: 这篇 2022 年的文章深入讲解阵列语言的思维方式，展示多维数组与矢量化运算如何改变问题解决的方法与性能。是处理数据密集型任务的实用入门。

items.title_en: PyTorch Landscape
items.title_zh: PyTorch Landscape
items.summary_en: An interactive landscape showing the PyTorch ecosystem: libraries, tooling, and trends around PyTorch. It helps developers understand which projects are gaining traction and how the ecosystem is evolving, useful for planning builds and contributing.
items.summary_zh: 这是一个交互式的 PyTorch 生态全景图，展示相关库、工具和发展趋势。开发者可据此判断哪些项目正在热门、生态如何迭代，从而更明智地选型与参与贡献。

items.title_en: Neutron scattering explains why gluten-free pasta falls apart (2025)
items.title_zh: 中子散射解释无麸质意面易碎的原因（2025）
items.summary_en: Neutron scattering revealed how water, starch, and protein interactions destabilize gluten-free pasta under heat and moisture. The findings guide better formulation and processing for gluten-free products, improving texture and cooking resilience. It contributes to broader insights into food science and material properties.
items.summary_zh: 通过中子散射研究，科学家揭示了在加热和潮湿条件下，水分、淀粉与蛋白质相互作用如何导致无麸质意面易断裂。研究结果为无麸质产品的配方与加工提供改进方向，提升口感与耐煮性，并为食品科学与材料性能领域提供更广泛的洞见。

items.title_en: NASA still maintains some of the Voyager spacecraft code from the 70s era
items.title_zh: NASA 仍在维护 70 年代的 Voyager 航天器代码
items.summary_en: NASA still maintains Voyager spacecraft code from the 70s, kept in a language few engineers fully understand, reflecting long-term knowledge preservation and aging staff.
items.summary_zh: NASA 仍在维护 70 年代的 Voyager 航天器的软件代码，使用极少数工程师能理解的语言，体现长期知识保留与人员老龄化挑战。

items.title_en: The lasting influence of Netscape Time
items.title_zh: Netscape Time 的持久影响
items.summary_en: An analysis of how Netscape's early web era set lasting molds for the Internet economy—browser wars, rapid feature cycles, and open web ethos. The piece argues that the Netscape moment seeded practices around product iteration, open standards, and venture-backed scale that still shape tech firms today.
items.summary_zh: 文章回顾早期网景时期对互联网经济的长期影响——浏览器之争、快速迭代、开放网络精神等。作者认为这段历史奠定了产品迭代、开放标准和风险资本驱动扩张等做法，至今影响着科技公司的运作方式。

items.title_en: Comparing an LZ4 Decompressor on Four Legacy CPUs
items.title_zh: 在四款遗留 CPU 上比较 LZ4 解压缩性能
items.summary_en: Benchmark results compare an LZ4 decompressor across four legacy CPUs, highlighting how processor age influences decompression throughput and efficiency. The findings inform optimization choices for embedded systems and legacy workloads.
items.summary_zh: 基准测试比较了四款遗留 CPU 上的 LZ4 解压缩性能，揭示处理器老化对解压吞吐率的影响。结果为嵌入式系统与遗留工作负载的优化提供参考。

items.title_en: A scoping review of bicycling interventions’ impacts on well-being
items.title_zh: 自行车干预对身心福祉影响的范围性综述
items.summary_en: A scoping review aggregates evidence on how cycling interventions affect well-being. Overall findings suggest improvements in physical health and mood, but results vary by intensity, duration, and population, highlighting gaps in long-term outcomes and equity considerations.
items.summary_zh: 综述汇总了自行车干预对身心福祉的影响。总体显示对体质和情绪有积极作用，但效果因强度、时长和人群而异，长期效果与公平性研究仍存在空白。

items.title_en: New map reveals lost roads of the Roman Empire
items.title_zh: 新地图揭示罗马帝国失落的道路
items.summary_en: A new high-resolution map reconstructs ancient Roman road networks, revealing previously unknown routes and 'lost' paths. The map reshapes understanding of imperial logistics, trade corridors, and settlement patterns, and showcases how modern GIS and archaeology converge.
items.summary_zh: 一张高分辨率的新地图重新绘制了古罗马公路网络，揭示了此前未知的路线与“失落的道路”。新地图改变了对帝国物流、贸易走廊与城镇布局的认识，展示了现代 GIS 与考古学的协同潜力。

items.title_en: The Mercury logic programming system
items.title_zh: Mercury 逻辑编程系统
items.summary_en: Mercury is a logic programming language and environment emphasizing reliability through a strong type and mode system. It offers a modern take on logic programming with tooling geared toward both research and education.
items.summary_zh: Mercury 是一门强调通过强类型与模式系统提升可靠性的逻辑编程语言及环境。它以现代化工具链为特征，适用于研究与教学场景。

items.title_en: Valve removes free game from Steam after players discover it contains malware
items.title_zh: Valve 在玩家发现免费游戏含有恶意软件后从 Steam 下架该作
items.summary_en: Valve removes a free horror game from Steam after players discover malware that steals data, illustrating ongoing risk in storefront curation and the importance of proactive malware monitoring. The move underscores the need for rapid response to protect users.
items.summary_zh: 在玩家发现免费恐怖游戏包含会窃取数据的恶意软件后，Valve 从 Steam 下架该作。这凸显了商店验收与恶意软件监测的持续风险，以及对用户保护的快速响应的重要性。

items.title_en: Iran will impose fees on subsea internet cables in Strait of Hormuz
items.title_zh: 伊朗将就霍尔木兹海峡的海底光缆征收费用
items.summary_en: Iran plans to levy fees on subsea internet cables transiting the Strait of Hormuz, signaling efforts to monetize critical infrastructure amid regional tensions. The move could affect international bandwidth costs and data routing for multiple regions.
items.summary_zh: 伊朗计划对经霍尔木兹海峡的海底光缆征收费用，显示其在紧张局势中对关键基础设施进行货币化的努力。此举可能影响多地区的国际带宽成本与数据路由。

items.title_en: Mocked by a scandal sheet, Kierkegaard endured months of personal attacks
items.title_zh: 被丑闻媒体嘲讽，基尔凯郭尔经历数月的人身攻击
items.summary_en: A historical piece recounts Kierkegaard enduring months of public harassment and ridicule in the press. It uses the episode to reflect on cancel culture, public scrutiny, and the resilience of intellectuals.
items.summary_zh: 这篇历史回顾讲述基尔凯郭尔在大众媒体的审视下遭受数月的人身攻击与嘲弄。文本借此反思公众知识分子在媒体关注下的脆弱性，以及持续从事哲学研究所需的韧性。

items.title_en: A Good Lemma Is Worth a Thousand Theorems (2007)
items.title_zh: 一个好引理胜千个定理（2007）
items.summary_en: A 2007 piece argues that a single well-chosen lemma can unlock many theorems, underscoring the value of strategic insight over brute force in math. The article is aimed at mathematicians and students, explaining the craft of finding foundational results.
items.summary_zh: 2007 年的一篇文章主张，一条用得恰当的引理往往可以推导出大量定理，强调在数学中对策略性洞见的重视胜过纯粹的证明堆砌。文章面向数学家与学生，阐释发现基础结果的策略性价值。

items.title_en: Where are all the UK red telephone kiosks?
items.title_zh: 英国红色电话亭都去哪儿了？
items.summary_en: UK red telephone kiosks are increasingly scarce, with a project cataloging the remaining kiosks and their repurposed uses. The effort highlights how public infrastructure and cultural artifacts are evolving in a digital era.
items.summary_zh: 英国红色电话亭正在逐渐减少，一项项目在整理剩余的亭子及其改造用途。 这一努力揭示了在数字化快速发展的背景下，公共基础设施和文化符号的演变与保留挑战。

items.title_en: Michael Keating has died
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·基廷去世
items.summary_en: Veteran actor Michael Keating has died at 78. Known for his long-running work in science fiction roles and collaborations with fan-focused studios, his passing marks a loss for the broader community of genre media and audio-plays.
items.summary_zh: 资深演员迈克尔·基廷去世，享年 78 岁。他在科幻角色和与粉丝向工作室的长期合作中留下印记，其离世对科幻圈和相关有声作品的社区而言是一大损失。

items.title_en: Ebola Outbreak Now Third Largest Recorded and "Spreading Rapidly"
items.title_zh: 埃博拉疫情现已成为有记录以来第三大且扩散迅速
items.summary_en: Ebola outbreak is now the third largest on record and is spreading rapidly, raising alarms about surveillance, vaccine access, and international coordination. The situation underscores the ongoing global health stakes.
items.summary_zh: 埃博拉疫情现已成为有记录以来第三大且扩散迅速，引发对监测、疫苗获取和国际协作的关注。强调全球卫生的紧急性与挑战。

items.title_en: Cutting inference cold starts by 40x with LP, FUSE, C/R, and CUDA-checkpoint
items.title_zh: 通过 LP、FUSE、C/R 与 CUDA 检点将推理冷启动加速 40 倍
items.summary_en: Modal claims to cut inference cold starts by 40x using a mix of persistence, layer fusion (FUSE), checkpoint/reload (C/R), and CUDA checkpointing. The approach reduces latency for serverless GPU inference, enabling faster bursts and lowering cost for sporadic workloads.
items.summary_zh: Modal 声称通过持久化、层融合（FUSE）、检查点/重载（C/R）以及 CUDA 检点等方法，将推理冷启动时间缩短 40 倍。该方法降低了服务器端无服务器 GPU 推理的启动延迟，有助于应对突发工作负载并降低成本。

items.title_en: Don't answer the first question
items.title_zh: 不要回答第一个问题
items.summary_en: Don't answer the first question argues for asking clarifying questions before answering to better understand the problem and provide higher-quality responses.
items.summary_zh: 不要直接回答第一个问题，主张在回答前先提问澄清，以更好地理解问题并提供更高质量的解答。

items.title_en: What is a Demand Coop
items.title_zh: 需求合作社是什么
items.summary_en: Explains the concept of a demand coop as a member-owned structure that coordinates buying power to secure better terms, offering an alternative to traditional supply chains.
items.summary_zh: 解释了需求合作社的概念：一种由成员所有、协同采购来争取更有利条款的组织形态，提供对传统供应链的替代方案。

items.title_en: Stable Audio 3
items.title_zh: 稳定音频3
items.summary_en: Stable Audio 3 presents advances in diffusion-based audio synthesis, enabling high-fidelity, controllable sound generation. The work discusses architectural improvements, data considerations, and trade-offs between quality and latency.
items.summary_zh: Stable Audio 3 在基于扩散的音频合成方面取得进展，使高保真、可控的音频生成成为可能。文中介绍了模型架构、数据选择以及质量与延迟之间的权衡。

items.title_en: Air France and Airbus found guilty of manslaughter over 2009 plane crash
items.title_zh: 空客和法航因2009年空难被判过失杀人罪
items.summary_en: A French court held Air France and Airbus legally responsible for a fatal 2009 crash, finding manslaughter due to negligence.
items.summary_zh: 法国法院认定空中客车和法航在2009年空难中有过失杀人罪，判定二者对事故负有法律责任。

items.title_en: Museum of Pocket Calculating Devices
items.title_zh: 袖珍计算器博物馆
items.summary_en: The Museum of Pocket Calculating Devices curates miniature calculators across history, tracing the evolution of handheld computation and user interfaces. The collection highlights how increasingly compact devices reshaped computing on the go.
items.summary_zh: 袖珍计算器博物馆收集了历史上各式袖珍计算器，展示了手持计算设备的演变及用户界面的发展。

items.title_en: Testing distributed systems with AI agents
items.title_zh: 用 AI 代理人测试分布式系统
items.summary_en: A project exploring using AI agents to stress-test distributed systems, generate fault scenarios, and monitor observability. It demonstrates how AI can automate test case discovery and accelerate reliability improvements, while raising questions about reproducibility and trust in AI-driven tests.
items.summary_zh: 该项目探索利用 AI 代理人对分布式系统进行压力测试、场景生成和可观测性检查，展示 AI 在自动化测试用例发现与提升可靠性方面的潜力，同时也提出可重复性与信任问题。

items.title_en: When Fast Fourier Transform Meets Transformer for Image Restoration (2024)
items.title_zh: FFT 与 Transformer 在图像修复中的结合（2024）
items.summary_en: Combining FFT-based processing with Transformer architectures for image restoration, this work demonstrates efficient frequency-domain techniques that complement self-attention. The result is improved restoration quality on high-resolution images with practical inference considerations.
items.summary_zh: 该工作将 FFT 处理与 Transformer 架构结合用于图像修复，展示了在频域中的高效处理如何与自注意力互补，从而在高分辨率图像上提升重建质量，并兼顾推理时的实用性。

items.title_en: Swap tables, flash-friendly swap, swap_ops, and more
items.title_zh: 交换表、面向闪存的交换、swap_ops 等
items.summary_en: A look at kernel-level swap innovations including swap tables, flash-friendly swap, and swap_ops, aimed at improving paging performance on modern storage devices. The notes discuss how these features help latency and endurance in systems with large memory pressure.
items.summary_zh: 本文概述内核层面的若干交换机制创新，包括交换表、面向闪存的交换和 swap_ops，旨在改善对现代存储设备的分页性能。介绍这些特性如何帮助降低延迟、提升在大内存压力场景下的耐久性和效率。

items.title_en: TikTok disproportionately served anti-Democratic videos during the 2024 election
items.title_zh: TikTok 在2024年大选期间不成比例地推送反民主视频
items.summary_en: A study finds TikTok delivered more anti-democratic content to users during the 2024 election, highlighting platform biases and challenges in moderating political content on short-video feeds. The results feed into policy debates about platform responsibility, algorithm transparency, and information ecosystems.
items.summary_zh: 研究发现 TikTok 在 2024 年大选期间向用户投放更多反民主内容，凸显平台偏见以及在短视频信息流中对政治内容审核的挑战。此结果将推动关于平台责任、算法透明度和信息生态的政策讨论。

items.title_en: In 1979 engineer Hugh Padgham discovered "gated reverb" – by accident
items.title_zh: 1979年，Hugh Padgham 意外发现了‘门控混响’
items.summary_en: A studio accident led to the creation of gated reverb, a defining 80s effect that shaped pop and rock production. The piece traces how unintended mistakes in a vocal-gating technique yielded a new tool that influenced mixing, synths, and studio workflow.
items.summary_zh: 一次录音现场的偶然失误催生了门控混响，成为80年代流行音乐的重要音效。文章回溯这一发现如何改变混音流程、合成器使用以及录音室的工作方式。

items.title_en: What Is Happening to Publishing?
items.title_zh: 出版业在发生什么？
